groups.title: Choice, Mode, Or Option Branch
groups.closureRule: The spell exposes mode selection, option-specific targeting/effects, allocation choices, or player/caster branch choices.

findings.issue: Actionable open: This row identifies resource-like prevention or component behavior that is not fully represented as a runtime resource rule.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resource/prevention fields where this is not ordinary spell components.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing component fields or Utility Options as interim representation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object or hit-point state needs object/stat fields that are not yet available on every affected low-level spell.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object stat/damageability fields for target objects and created objects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep object facts in description/Utility Options until schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Moving created lights/forms needs an owned movable effect schema rather than simple target movement.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movable created-effect fields for distance, leash, and action cost.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options as interim runtime representation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for post-spell knowledge and delayed consequences.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep aftermath text in Utility Options/description until schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Created objects/forms need object-state fields for durability, placement, dimensions, and disappearance.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created object/structure bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep creation facts in Utility Options until object-state schema is propagated.

findings.issue: Actionable open: This row identifies resource-like prevention or component behavior that is not fully represented as a runtime resource rule.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resource/prevention fields where this is not ordinary spell components.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing component fields or Utility Options as interim representation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for post-spell knowledge and delayed consequences.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep aftermath text in Utility Options/description until schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Aftermath knowledge or later memory effects need a follow-up/aftermath schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/memory fields for post-spell knowledge and delayed consequences.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep aftermath text in Utility Options/description until schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Ignition, weather, sensory, or cosmetic environmental change needs a reusable environment/world-state bucket.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environment/world-state fields for ignition, weather, sensory phenomena, and lasting environmental facts.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep current utility/terrain/damage representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Guidance adds 1d4 to ability checks for the chosen skill, but runtime JSON only records a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-check modifier fields parallel to attack-roll and save-penalty fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime effect data for ability-check bonus: dice 1d4, applies while active, restricted to the chosen skill.

findings.issue: The pull is represented, but the damage only applies if the target is within 5 feet after the pull; that post-movement gate is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a post-movement damage gate field for distance-from-caster checks.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime condition data that gates the damage effect on target distance after forced movement.

findings.issue: Mold Earth can excavate/move/deposit loose earth, make difficult terrain, or restore normal terrain; JSON has terrain/manipulation but needs review against all modes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Split terrain manipulation modes and durations explicitly.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Ensure runtime terrain/manipulation data covers excavation, deposit distance, difficult terrain, normal terrain, and one-hour duration.

findings.issue: Magic Mark places color, mark, or symbol on an object or surface for 1 hour.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Use surface-marking fields shared with Mold Earth-like effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceMarking data for Magic Mark.

findings.issue: Minor Creation can create a nonmagical trinket or illusory image that fits in the caster's hand and lasts until the end of the next turn.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add option-specific created-object/illusion fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime utility option for hand-sized trinket or illusory image with no damage and no monetary worth.

findings.issue: Prestidigitation can light/snuff small fires, clean/soil an object, chill/warm/flavor nonliving material, and create harmless sensory effects.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add utility option fields for fire play, clean/soil, temperature/flavor, and harmless sensory effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime utilityOptions for these world-state changes.

findings.issue: Shape Water changes water flow, color, opacity, and frozen state in the world, including a no-creatures-in-water freeze prerequisite and no-damage movement caveat.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental substance-change fields for water movement distance, no-damage caveat, color/opacity, freeze, creature exclusion, and unfreeze timing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime world-state data for water movement, coloring/opacity, and freeze/unfreeze behavior.

findings.issue: Spare the Dying targets a creature with exactly 0 Hit Points that is not dead; current structured markdown and JSON only say creatures/allies.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target eligibility fields for current HP state and death-state exclusion.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target filter data requiring 0 HP and not dead.

findings.issue: Booming Voice grants Advantage on Charisma (Intimidation) checks for 1 minute, but this ability-check modifier is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-check modifier fields for advantage/disadvantage, ability, skill, duration, and source option.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data for Charisma (Intimidation) advantage while Booming Voice is active.

findings.issue: Tremors causes harmless ground tremors for 1 minute; this gray-zone world-state effect is not structured.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add harmless terrain/surface disturbance option fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime utility option data for harmless ground tremors.

findings.issue: Thaumaturgy modifies voice volume, flames, and creates a point-originating sound, but these sensory mechanics are collapsed into one description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensory utility option fields for voice volume multiplier, flame brightness/color changes, and point-originating sounds.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensory option data for Booming Voice, Fire Play, and Phantom Sound.

findings.issue: Thaumaturgy can change existing flames and open or shut unlocked doors/windows, but these world-state object changes are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add utility option fields for flame alteration and unlocked door/window open-or-shut movement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange/objectManipulation data for Fire Play and Invisible Hand.

findings.issue: Thorn Whip's size-gated pull is partially represented, and the runtime direction was corrected to toward_caster, but the optional 'can pull' choice remains flattened.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add forced-movement option fields for optional pull, pull-toward-caster direction, maximum distance, and Large-or-smaller size gate.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime optional forcedMovement choice data; the existing direction defect was corrected from away_from_caster to toward_caster.

findings.issue: Vicious Mockery can target a creature the caster can see or hear; current targeting only records lineOfSight=true and does not represent hearing as an alternate perception path.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target acquisition fields for visible_or_audible targets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targeting perception data that permits sight or hearing within range.

findings.issue: Alarm can ward a door, a window, or a 20-foot cube and lets the caster choose audible or mental alarm mode, but JSON keeps those choices in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward target-shape fields and alarm mode choice fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ward target data and mode data for audible versus mental alarm.

findings.issue: The audible alarm creates a handbell sound for 10 seconds within 60 feet of the warded area, but sound duration and radius are not structured.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add audible alarm fields for sound type, sound duration, and audible radius.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensory data for a 10-second handbell audible within 60 feet.

findings.issue: Alarm's core ward trigger, intrusion conditions, exempt creatures, audible/mental delivery, mental one-mile range, and sleep wake-up are flattened into one utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/alarm fields for trigger event, warded area/object, exempt creatures, delivery mode, mental range, and wakes-sleeping-caster behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime alarm/ward data instead of prose-only utility.

findings.issue: Bane subtracts 1d4 from attack rolls and saving throws made by failed-save targets, but structured markdown and JSON only apply a generic Bane status; the save outcome was corrected to negates_condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add attack/save penalty fields for affected roll types, dice 1d4, failed-save gate, and duration while concentrated.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime rollModifier data for attack rolls and saving throws instead of relying on status-condition name semantics.

findings.issue: The Grovel option applies the Prone condition, but that state change is flattened into option text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add option-level status/state fields for utility control options that apply named conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime option-level statusCondition/stateChange data for Grovel applying Prone.

findings.issue: Comprehend Languages distinguishes heard language, seen signed language, and seen written language, but runtime JSON stores them in one prose description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add language comprehension mode fields for heard speech, seen signing, and seen writing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime languageUnderstanding modes instead of relying on prose.

findings.issue: Disguise Self can change apparent height by up to 1 foot and apparent weight, but these appearance constraints are only prose in a generic utility effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add disguise appearance fields for included worn/carried gear, apparent height delta, apparent weight change, and same-limb-arrangement requirement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime disguiseAppearance data instead of relying on description text.

findings.issue: Faerie Fire grants Advantage on attacks against affected creatures or objects if the attacker can see the target, but runtime JSON only stores this in description text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add attack advantage fields with visible-to-attacker prerequisite and affected creature/object scope.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attackRollModifier data for incoming advantage while visible.

findings.issue: A familiar can deliver a touch spell only by taking its Reaction while within 100 feet, but this is only partly represented as a named special action.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reaction delivery fields for touch spell delivery, familiar distance limit, and reaction consumption.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add structured touchSpellDelivery data instead of relying on specialActions description text.

findings.issue: Shared senses let the caster see and hear through the familiar and gain any special senses until the start of the caster's next turn.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensory sharing fields for sight, hearing, special senses, duration, range, and action cost.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Extend sharedSenses data beyond a boolean so the runtime knows the senses, bonus-action cost, 100-foot limit, and until-start-next-turn duration.

findings.issue: Hex requires choosing one ability for the ability-check disadvantage rider; structured and JSON list options, but the choice is not represented as a typed ability-check modifier.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-check modifier fields for chosen ability and disadvantage.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data tied to the chosen ability instead of relying on generic controlOptions text.

findings.issue: Hex's extra damage on attack hits is represented, but the chosen-ability disadvantage on ability checks is only generic utility/control text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-check modifier fields parallel to attack-roll and save modifier fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data for disadvantage on checks made with the chosen ability.

findings.issue: Illusory Script changes what different viewer groups can read or perceive, and Truesight bypasses the hidden message, but visibility/readability rules are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add viewer-specific readability and bypass-sense fields for written illusions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime viewerRules data for designated creatures, others, and Truesight.

findings.issue: Jump grants a specific once-per-turn movement option with a fixed jump distance and movement cost, but this is not modeled as movement data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement option fields for jump distance, movement cost, frequency, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementOption data for jump up to 30 feet by spending 10 feet of movement once per turn.

findings.issue: Longstrider increases the target's Speed by 10 feet, but runtime JSON stores this as generic utility prose instead of a movement/speed modifier.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add speed modifier fields for amount, movement mode, target, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime speedModifier data for +10 feet while active.

findings.issue: The Poisoned condition is represented, though the current duration model is still coarse for 'until the end of your next turn'.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Later duration work should add until_end_of_caster_next_turn as an explicit status duration value.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Later runtime duration work should replace rounds:1 with a caster-next-turn end marker.

findings.issue: Shield's reaction trigger includes being hit by an attack or being targeted by Magic Missile; runtime represents both effects, but the +5 AC effect's reactionTrigger only records when_hit and does not explicitly model 'including against the triggering attack'.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defensive reaction fields for retroactive triggering-attack coverage and multiple trigger alternatives.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime reactionTrigger data that can express hit-by-attack, targeted-by-specific-spell, and applies-to-triggering-attack.

findings.issue: Silent Image is purely visual, explicitly excludes sound, smell, and other sensory effects, and becomes see-through to creatures that discern it; runtime JSON keeps those sensory rules in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensory illusion fields for included senses, excluded senses, and post-discernment visibility.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionSensory data for visual-only, no sound/smell/other senses, and see-through after discernment.

findings.issue: Sleep has a two-stage status flow: failed first save gives Incapacitated until the end of the next turn, then failed second save gives Unconscious for the duration. Runtime JSON now carries both stages, but the relationship is still encoded with generic trigger/requiresStatus fields rather than a dedicated staged status model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add staged status fields for Incapacitated-to-Unconscious progression.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace the generic two-effect approximation with dedicated runtime stagedStatus data for second-save failure applying Unconscious for the duration.

findings.issue: Speak with Animals lets the caster use any Influence action skill option with Beasts, but runtime JSON only stores generic communication prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social action option fields for enabled Influence skill options and target creature type.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime socialActionOptions data for Influence options with Beasts.

findings.issue: Speak with Animals grants comprehension and verbal communication with Beasts, but runtime JSON does not expose target creature type, communication mode, or comprehension as fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication fields for creature type, verbal communication, and comprehension.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication data for comprehend_and_speak_with Beasts.

findings.issue: Beasts can provide information about nearby locations and monsters and whatever they perceived within the past day, but the knowledge payload and limits are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for nearby locations, monsters, perceived-within-past-day, and topic limitations.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgePayload data for Beast information limits and categories.

findings.issue: Tasha's Caustic Brew requires choosing a direction for the acid line, but runtime targeting does not expose direction choice.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add line direction choice fields for caster-originating line areas.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime areaDirectionChoice data for the 30-foot line.

findings.issue: Tasha's Caustic Brew now uses a failed Dexterity save to apply Covered in Acid and turn-start acid damage, but the scrape/wash action cleanup and exact recurring condition lifecycle still need first-class fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring damage condition fields and action cleanup fields for scrape_or_wash_off self/other.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed the stale immediate half-damage model by adding Covered in Acid plus turn_start damage requiring that status; add runtime cleanup action data for scraping or washing the acid off.

findings.issue: Prone and Incapacitated are now separate status effects, but the rule that the target cannot end Prone on itself while affected is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add condition lock fields for cannot_end_condition_self while another spell effect is active.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionLock data preventing the target from ending Prone on itself while the spell lasts.

findings.issue: Tenser's Floating Disk must be created in an unoccupied visible space, but runtime targeting does not expose the unoccupied-space requirement.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add point-placement eligibility fields for unoccupied space.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placementFilter.unoccupied true for the disk.

findings.issue: Aid increases both Hit Point maximum and current Hit Points, but runtime JSON models the effect as temporary_hp, which is mechanically different.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add max-hit-point increase fields that also raise current HP for the duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace defensive temporary_hp with runtime maxHpIncrease/currentHpIncrease data.

findings.issue: Alter Self has three options and lets the caster use a Magic action during the duration to replace the chosen option; runtime JSON stores this as one prose control utility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add option/mode fields for Aquatic Adaptation, Change Appearance, Natural Weapons, and Magic-action option replacement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime utilityOptions data and optionReplaceAction magic_action.

findings.issue: Change Appearance can alter voice sound and visible appearance details, but runtime JSON does not expose allowed appearance/sound changes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add appearance-change fields for height, weight, facial features, voice, hair, coloration, and distinguishing characteristics.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime appearanceChange data including voice.

findings.issue: Change Appearance is a disguise/appearance mode with species, size, and body-shape restrictions, but these are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add disguise/appearance fields for species appearance, no stat change, same size, and same basic shape restrictions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime disguise data for the Change Appearance option.

findings.issue: Alter Self grants underwater breathing, swim speed equal to Speed, and natural weapon attack/damage replacement using spellcasting ability, but these mechanics are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mode-specific fields for underwater breathing, swim speed equals Speed, natural weapon type/damage choices, and spellcasting ability substitution.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movement/breathing and attackAugment data for Aquatic Adaptation and Natural Weapons.

findings.issue: Animal Messenger requires choosing a Tiny Beast, visited location, described recipient, and up-to-25-word message; runtime JSON only stores prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication setup fields for target beast, destination, recipient description, and message word limit.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime messengerPayload data for destination, recipient description, and 25-word message.

findings.issue: Animal Messenger now has a Charisma save in runtime JSON, but the CR-not-0 automatic success rule is still not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add automatic save success fields based on target Challenge Rating.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetFilter or saveModifier data for CR != 0 automatically succeeds.

findings.issue: The spell carries a 25-word message to a described recipient at a visited location and the Beast mimics the caster's communication, but these payload details are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add message delivery fields for word limit, destination prerequisite, recipient descriptor, mimic communication, lost message, and return behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime messageDelivery data.

findings.issue: The Beast travels toward the specified location at about 25 miles per 24 hours, or 50 miles if it can fly, but runtime JSON only stores this in description text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add messenger travel fields for speed per 24 hours and flying speed variant.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime travelRate data for walking and flying messenger travel.

findings.issue: Arcane Vigor is now typed as HEALING in runtime JSON, but the Hit Dice expenditure, one-or-two dice choice, and slot-scaling number of dice are not represented as structured resource-spend fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add healing resource fields for spending unexpended Hit Dice, selectable dice count, spellcasting ability modifier, and dice-count scaling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed the utility-vs-healing mismatch by changing runtime to HEALING; add runtime hitDiceSpend data for selected and expended dice.

findings.issue: Augury's omen result is selected from a fixed Weal/Woe/Weal-and-Woe/Nothing table by the DM, but structured markdown and runtime JSON keep that result set in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge/omen result fields for fixed outcome tables and decision authority.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime omenResultOptions data with DM-selected Weal, Woe, Weal and Woe, or Nothing results.

findings.issue: Blindness/Deafness requires the caster to choose Blinded or Deafened for each failed save, but runtime JSON still models the choice through AI prompt text and parallel status effects rather than a typed choice field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status-choice fields for mutually exclusive condition choices on a shared save.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime statusChoice data that groups Blinded and Deafened as alternatives under one Constitution save.

findings.issue: Both possible status outcomes are now present in runtime JSON, but the mutually exclusive chosen status is still not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mutually exclusive status-choice fields for save-gated condition alternatives.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace parallel status effects with a grouped statusChoice mechanic once that runtime field family exists.

findings.issue: Blur's Blindsight/Truesight immunity is currently only in notes/prose and is not modeled as an attacker-sense exception.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add attacker perception exception fields for attack modifiers bypassed by specific senses.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attackerSenseException data for Blindsight and Truesight bypassing Blur's disadvantage.

findings.issue: When Calm Emotions ends, the creature's attitude returns to normal, but the restoration/aftermath state is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath/restoration fields for temporary attitude changes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restoresPreviousAttitude or equivalent for the indifference mode.

findings.issue: Cordon of Arrows lets the caster designate ignored creatures when cast, but the ignore list is not modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add exclusion/ignore-list fields for caster-designated creatures.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ignoredCreatures or targetExclusions data for chosen creatures.

findings.issue: Darkness has two placement modes: point in range or object that is not worn or carried. Runtime targeting only models the point/Sphere mode.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add alternate target mode fields for point versus unattended object, including not-worn-or-carried object eligibility.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target modes for point-origin Sphere and object-origin Emanation.

findings.issue: Detect Thoughts has distinct knowledge payloads: presence of thinking creature, surface thought, deeper reasoning/emotions/looming concern, and target awareness of probing; runtime descriptions do not model those payloads.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for thought presence, surface thought, deeper probe details, and target-awareness side effect.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime thoughtSense/readThoughts/probeDeeper data with payload and awareness fields.

findings.issue: Dragon's Breath requires choosing one damage type from Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, or Poison, but runtime stores the choice as a slash-delimited damage type string.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add chosen damage type fields with allowed damage type options.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace slash-delimited damage type with runtime damageTypeChoice options and selected damage type.

findings.issue: Enhance Ability requires choosing one ability per target, and higher-level casting can choose a different ability for each additional target; runtime only has a corrected prose description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-target ability choice fields with allowed abilities Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime abilityChoice data and allow one selected ability per target.

findings.issue: The spell grants Advantage on ability checks using the chosen ability, but there is no ability-check modifier effect model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-check modifier fields for advantage/disadvantage/bonus, chosen ability filter, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data: type advantage, applies to chosen ability, duration while active.

findings.issue: Enlarge/Reduce has two mutually exclusive modes with different size, check/save, and damage modifiers, but runtime still stores the modes as utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mode fields for Enlarge and Reduce with per-mode size-category delta, Strength check/save modifier, and weapon/unarmed damage adjustment.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime mode data instead of relying on one utility description.

findings.issue: The initial Constitution save applies only to unwilling creature targets, and the Strength check/save advantage/disadvantage plus +/-1d4 hit damage are not represented as typed modifiers.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional save eligibility for unwilling creature targets, ability-check/save modifier fields, and hit-damage modifier fields with minimum damage floor.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime unwillingTargetSave plus mode-specific strengthModifier and hitDamageModifier data.

findings.issue: Enthrall applies a -10 penalty to Wisdom (Perception) checks and Passive Perception, but runtime has only a generic utility description and the existing savePenalty shape only covers saving throws.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability/skill/passive-score penalty fields for Wisdom (Perception) checks and Passive Perception.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime perceptionPenalty data with flat -10 for Wisdom (Perception) checks and Passive Perception.

findings.issue: Flame Blade creates a persistent conjured weapon-like object, but the created object is not modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conjured weapon/object fields for hand requirement, object shape, duration, and lifecycle.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conjuredWeapon data for fiery blade in free hand.

findings.issue: Flaming Sphere creates a persistent movable hazard entity, but it is modeled as area targeting plus damage effects only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add persistent movable hazard fields for created area entities.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdHazard/movableArea data for the sphere.

findings.issue: The caster chooses the Line direction and can change it later as a Bonus Action, but line direction state is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add directional area fields for chosen direction and later direction changes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime directionalArea data for chosen line direction.

findings.issue: The Strength save applies when the Line affects a creature initially and again when a creature ends its turn in the Line; runtime has only one movement effect with coarse trigger modeling.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring area save fields for initial and end-turn forced movement saves.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime forcedMovement triggers for initial-in-area and end-turn-in-area saves.

findings.issue: The 15-foot push away following the Line is partially represented, but trigger timing and line-following direction need more precise data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add forced movement direction qualifiers for along_line/away_from_caster and trigger timing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Refine runtime forcedMovement with line-following direction and initial/end-turn triggers.

findings.issue: Gust of Wind imposes 2-for-1 movement cost toward the caster, disperses gas/vapor, extinguishes unprotected flames, makes protected flames dance, and gives protected flames a 50 percent extinguish chance; runtime only has a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental wind fields for movement cost, gas/vapor dispersal, unprotected flame extinguish, protected flame disturbance, and percent chance extinguish.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime windArea data for movement cost and environmental flame/gas effects.

findings.issue: Heat Metal targets a manufactured metal object, specifically including metal weapons and Heavy or Medium metal armor, but runtime only records generic objects.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add manufactured metal object target fields with example categories weapon and Heavy/Medium metal armor.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectFilter material metal, manufactured true, category weapon_or_heavy_medium_armor.

findings.issue: The damage is represented and repeat damage now has Bonus Action cost, but the post-damage Constitution save, forced drop if possible, and disadvantage on attacks/ability checks until start of caster's next turn are prose-only utility data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add post-damage rider fields for holder/wearer save, drop object if possible, and attack/ability-check disadvantage duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime postDamageRider data for Constitution save, dropObject, and disadvantage if not dropped.

findings.issue: Hold Person's higher-level casting adds one Humanoid target per slot level above 2, but runtime target count remains fixed at 1 and target scaling is prose-like effect scaling.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target-count scaling fields for +1 target per slot level above base.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetScaling data for +1 Humanoid target per slot above 2.

findings.issue: Arcane Lock suppression lasts 10 minutes while the spell itself is instantaneous; that temporary suppression duration is not modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary suppression duration fields for other spell/effect suppression.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime suppressesEffect data for Arcane Lock with duration 10 minutes.

findings.issue: Lesser Restoration ends one condition chosen from Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, or Poisoned, but runtime stores this as a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add condition-removal fields for one-of listed removable conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionRemoval data with maxRemoved 1 and options Blinded, Deafened, Paralyzed, Poisoned.

findings.issue: Levitate can target loose objects up to 500 pounds, but object looseness and weight limit are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object target eligibility fields for loose/unattended state and maximum weight.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectEligibility loose true and maxWeightPounds 500.

findings.issue: Locate Animals or Plants returns direction and distance to the closest matching Beast, Plant creature, or nonmagical plant within 5 miles, but target category options, closest-match selection, and if-present result semantics are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detection query fields for named/described kind, allowed categories, search radius, closest result, direction payload, distance payload, and absent-result behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detectionQuery data for Beast, Plant creature, or nonmagical plant within 5 miles.

findings.issue: Magic Mouth lets the caster choose whether the spell ends after one delivery or remains to repeat on future triggers; runtime currently says it ends after speaking.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delivery persistence mode fields for end_after_delivery versus repeat_on_trigger.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatMode data for one-shot or repeating trigger behavior.

findings.issue: The trigger must be based on visual or audible conditions within 30 feet of the object, but runtime has a generic on_enter_area trigger.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trigger sense fields for visual/audible condition types and trigger sensing radius.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime triggerCondition data with allowedSenses visual/audible and radius 30 feet.

findings.issue: Magic Mouth is a triggered object enchantment with freely specified visual/audible trigger conditions and repeat/one-shot behavior, but trigger details are flattened.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/trigger fields for arbitrary trigger condition text, sensory basis, radius, repeat behavior, and delivery action.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trigger data instead of a single on_enter_area trigger.

findings.issue: Melf's Acid Arrow has hit, miss, and delayed-hit-only damage branches; runtime has initial hit damage and delayed damage, but miss half-damage and the delayed damage's hit dependency are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add attack outcome branch fields for hit damage, miss half initial damage only, and delayed damage only if hit.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attackOutcome data with missHalfInitialNoDelayed and delayedDamage.requiresInitialHit.

findings.issue: While the caster has location knowledge, the target cannot become hidden from the caster and gains no benefit from Invisible against the caster; these visibility/stealth overrides are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add visibility/stealth override fields for cannot hide from caster and Invisible condition grants no benefit against caster.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime visibilityOverride data tied to the failed-save tracking rider.

findings.issue: The tracking rider lasts until the spell ends but is only useful while both creatures are on the same plane; the same-plane limit is not modeled as an ongoing condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ongoing-condition fields for same-plane gating on duration-bound knowledge effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ongoingCondition samePlaneRequired for the tracking rider.

findings.issue: Creatures with Blinded, Blindsight, or Truesight are unaffected, but these perception exceptions are only prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add perception exception fields for defensive/illusion effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime perceptionException data for Blinded, Blindsight, and Truesight.

findings.issue: Nystul's Magic Aura has target-dependent modes: Mask for creatures and False Aura for objects, with creature type choice and object aura/magic-state choices.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target-dependent utility mode fields and choice fields for creature type and aura school/magical appearance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime modes Mask and FalseAura with allowed target types and choices.

findings.issue: Pass without Trace affects the caster and each creature the caster chooses while in the aura, but runtime applies the prose generically and target choice inside the aura is not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura participant selection fields for caster plus chosen creatures in emanation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime auraParticipants data for caster and chosen creatures while in the 30-foot Emanation.

findings.issue: The +10 Dexterity (Stealth) check bonus and no-tracks rider are prose-only; current savePenalty shape does not model skill checks.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability/skill check bonus fields and track-suppression fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime skillCheckModifier data for Dexterity (Stealth) +10 and environmentalTrace noTracks.

findings.issue: Pass without Trace suppresses track creation for affected creatures, but that environmental trace behavior is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trace/tracking fields for no tracks left by affected creatures.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime traceSuppression data.

findings.issue: The phantasm includes sound, temperature, and other stimuli and is perceivable only to the target, but sensory channels and audience are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensory illusion fields for sound, temperature, other stimuli, and perceivable-only-to-target audience.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensoryIllusion data with targetOnly true.

findings.issue: The target perceives damage as a type appropriate to the illusion while actual damage is Psychic; perceived damage type is not modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add perceived damage type fields separate from mechanical damage type.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime perceivedDamageType appropriate_to_illusion while damage.type remains Psychic.

findings.issue: Pyrotechnics requires choosing Fireworks or Smoke after extinguishing a qualifying flame, but runtime uses separate prose utility effects without a first-class mode choice.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime modeChoice Fireworks|Smoke.

findings.issue: The Fireworks mode applies a Constitution save to creatures within 10 feet or Blinded until end of caster's next turn, but mode-scoped save/status data is not first-class.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Fireworks mode status data for Con save negates Blinded within 10 feet.

findings.issue: Fireworks produces a dazzling display causing Blinded, while Smoke creates heavy obscurement; the actual visual obstruction mechanics are flattened.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime visionEffect data for Blinded burst and heavilyObscured smoke area.

findings.issue: Fireworks applies Blinded until the end of the caster's next turn on a failed Constitution save, but runtime does not expose this as STATUS_CONDITION data.

findings.issue: Ray of Enfeeblement has different branches on successful and failed Constitution saves: success causes next-attack disadvantage until start of caster's next turn, failure causes disadvantage on Strength-based D20 Tests plus -1d8 to all damage rolls for duration. Runtime has only a generic utility/status description.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveOutcomeBranches for success and failure effects.

findings.issue: Skywrite creates visible cloud words in a sky location the caster can see; the visibility and sky placement are prose-only.

findings.issue: Protection from Energy requires a selected damage type from five options.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add selected damage type choice fields for defensive effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime choice data for exactly one of Acid, Cold, Fire, Lightning, Thunder.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Wards, glyph triggers, and delayed triggered effects need trigger-condition and stored-effect fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/trigger bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Reaction/opportunity restrictions need explicit action-permission fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reaction/opportunity restriction bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: The detector matched AC, but the real mechanic is a creature defensive-stat penalty, not object damageability.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add AC penalty under defensive/stat modifier fields, not object stats.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime AC penalty -2 in a debuff/stat modifier model.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Some state changes are not simple D&D conditions and need state-change fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add state-change bucket fields for non-condition states.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use STATUS_CONDITION where possible and Utility Options elsewhere.

findings.issue: The corpse target and up-to-five questions are not represented as runtime data.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime corpse target filter and maxQuestions 5.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Communication rules need sender/recipient, language, plane, and message-shape fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Environmental changes need reusable world-state fields for weather, obscurement, growth, gas, liquids, and hazards.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environment/world-state bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/damage/utility fields as interim data.

findings.issue: Speak with Plants can convert plant-related difficult/ordinary terrain in either direction.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plant terrain conversion mode fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainConversion data for difficult-to-ordinary and ordinary-with-plants-to-difficult.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

findings.issue: Spirit Guardians ties spectral form and damage type to caster alignment, with a good/neutral appearance choice.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime alignmentMode data: good/neutral Radiant with angelic/fey appearance choice, evil Necrotic fiendish.

findings.issue: The save and Poisoned condition are partially represented; action/bonus action lockout and exact duration remain unmodeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add short condition duration and action/bonus action restriction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime poisoned rider cannotTakeActionOrBonusAction and duration until end of current turn.

findings.issue: Thunder Step has destination occupancy and optional passenger eligibility/placement rules that are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination and passenger eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleport data for unoccupied visible destination and optional passenger willing, size<=caster, within 5 feet, carrying capacity, destination space within 5 feet or left behind.

findings.issue: Thunder Step teleport movement and carried object/passenger rules are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport movement, carried object, and passenger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime TELEPORT/UTILITY movement effect with self, carried objects within capacity, and optional passenger.

findings.issue: Tongues grants understanding of spoken or signed languages and makes the target understandable to creatures that know at least one language, but runtime only has utilityType plus prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structured communication-language fields for understood modes, expressed modes, recipient eligibility, and hear/see requirements.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communicationLanguage data instead of relying on description prose.

findings.issue: Any creature that knows at least one language can understand the target if it can hear the speech or see the signing; the language-knowledge eligibility is not first-class.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add typed recipient filters for creatures that know at least one language and can hear or see the target's communication.

findings.issue: Targets gain the ability to breathe underwater while retaining normal respiration; runtime stores this as utility prose without typed environmental adaptation fields.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalAdaptation data for underwater breathing plus normal respiration retained.

findings.issue: Loose lightweight materials fly upward and ordinary projectiles launched at targets behind the wall miss automatically, with heavy/siege projectile exceptions; runtime now preserves these as utility controlOptions but lacks filterable projectile/material rules.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/interception fields for ordinary projectile auto-miss, lightweight material updraft, and exception filters.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime interception/projectileFilter data instead of prose-only controlOptions.

findings.issue: Each creature of the caster's choice can be affected, but runtime maxTargets remains 1 and cannot represent arbitrary chosen creatures in range.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target count semantics for each creature of choice within range.

findings.issue: Affected targets must roll 1d10 at the start of each turn and consult a behavior table; runtime only stores a generic Confused condition.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime randomBehaviorTable data for Confusion.

findings.issue: Affected targets can't take Bonus Actions or Reactions, but runtime has no typed action-lockout fields on the Confused condition.

findings.issue: The caster chooses Acid, Cold, Fire, or Lightning when making each attack; runtime stores the damage types as a combined string and does not type per-attack damage-type choice.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime damageTypeChoice data for Acid/Cold/Fire/Lightning chosen on each attack.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain target filters and damageTypeChoice data.

findings.issue: The damage save can trigger when the Emanation enters a creature's space, when a creature enters it, or when a creature ends its turn there, and only once per turn; runtime has a single damage effect and cannot express all trigger paths.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime areaDamageTriggers data for emanation movement, creature entry, end-turn, caster choice, and once-per-turn.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlOptions/grantedActions data for the four water-control modes.

findings.issue: The Whirlpool mode forces a Strength saving throw on enter/end-turn, with damage and restraint-like escape movement rules, but runtime has no typed Whirlpool damage/save effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add option-scoped save/damage fields for environmental control modes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Whirlpool damage/save data.

findings.issue: Part Water creates a trench and water walls, Redirect Flow changes water flow over obstacles and walls, and water returns to normal after leaving the area; runtime has none of these surface/flow states typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add water terrain/state fields for trench, water walls, redirected flow, obstacle traversal, and flow normalization outside the area.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime waterState/controlMode data.

findings.issue: Flood can create a 20-foot wave, Part Water creates a trench and side walls, and Whirlpool creates a shaped whirlpool with base/top width and height; runtime lacks typed created water-structure geometry.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdWaterStructure data.

findings.issue: Whirlpool effects trigger when creatures are within 25 feet, enter for the first time on a turn, or end their turn there; runtime has no typed environmental trigger gating.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Whirlpool trigger data.

findings.issue: Every Control Water mode changes water state, flow, level, or shape; runtime only contains a generic control description.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalControl modes for Flood, Part Water, Redirect Flow, and Whirlpool.

findings.issue: Each active mode lasts until the spell ends or the caster chooses a different effect, and Part Water then fills back over the next round; runtime lacks mode replacement and restoration timing.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mode-duration/replacement fields and restoration-after-mode fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime modeDuration and restorationTiming data.

findings.issue: The caster teleports to a seen, visualized, or described location within 500 feet, can bring one willing creature within 5 feet, places that creature within 5 feet of the destination, and takes 4d6 Force damage with the passenger if the destination is occupied or filled; runtime stores this as utility prose only.

findings.issue: The participant's Hit Point maximum increases by 2d10 and the participant gains the same number of Hit Points; runtime now records the healing and prose but lacks a first-class hit-point-maximum-increase amount field.
