findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records Extra turns and Stopped time in Utility Options and a granted action.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Full revival is represented, but poison/contagion/curse removal and body repair need condition/restoration effect support.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration/removal bucket for poison, contagion, curses, wounds, organs, limbs, and undead restoration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes HEALING all_hit_points plus restoration Utility Options.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Replacing damaged/missing organs/limbs and creating a new body need body-restoration/new-body schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resurrection body restoration and body creation bucket.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records body restoration and new body placement as Utility Options and movement.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Dead-to-living and Undead-to-non-Undead transitions need lifecycle/type-change schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add lifecycle resurrection and creature-type restoration fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records the transitions in Utility Options.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Roll Redo can force a reroll with Advantage or Disadvantage and choose original/reroll; this needs a reroll intervention schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reroll/roll-replacement bucket with timing, advantage state, and choose-original-or-reroll.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records Roll Redo in Utility Options only.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Wish stress, 33 percent lockout, and costly-component bypass need resource/risk schema beyond ordinary components.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resource-risk bucket for casting lockout chance, component bypass, and stress state.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records stress and lockout in Utility Options plus Necrotic damage effect.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object Creation needs object value/dimensions/placement schema rather than prose-only utility option.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created object constraints bucket with value, magic-item exclusion, dimensions, and placement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records Object Creation in Utility Options.

groups.title: Summon, Control, Possession, Or Soul Lifecycle
groups.closureRule: Summoned, animated, controlled, possessed, or soul/container states need lifecycle data distinct from ordinary spell ending.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Created sensory effects or minor entities need summon/created-entity fields if they become independently addressable.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created entity/effect bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep current Utility Options as interim runtime representation.

findings.issue: Mage Hand creates a persistent controllable entity, but the entity is not modeled with actions, movement, or limits.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled utility entity fields for entity type, allowed actions, later-turn control action, movement distance, range tether, carry limit, and prohibited actions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledEntity data for the hand.

findings.issue: Shape Water can form and animate simple water shapes for 1 hour, but the created/animated form is not represented structurally.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled or animated substance fields for simple shape creation, animation direction, and one-hour duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime data for water shape/form animation instead of prose-only utility text.

findings.issue: Find Familiar requires choosing a familiar form and creature type, and recasting changes the existing familiar's eligible form instead of creating another familiar.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon choice fields for form choice, creature type choice, and recast form replacement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon choice data for eligible forms, Celestial/Fey/Fiend type selection, and one-familiar recast replacement.

findings.issue: The familiar appears and reappears only in unoccupied spaces, eligible forms are Beast CR 0 forms, and one familiar is allowed at a time.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon placement and eligibility fields for unoccupied space, CR 0 Beast form eligibility, and one-active-familiar limit.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon placement constraints, eligible form filters, and active-instance limit.

findings.issue: Find Familiar grants telepathic communication with the familiar within 100 feet, but telepathy is only a summon subfield and not connected to communication mechanics.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication fields for telepathic link target and range.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication/telepathy data or standardize summon telepathy fields across the template.

findings.issue: The summon is represented, but independent initiative, ally status, no-attack restriction, allowed normal actions, chosen-form statistics, disappearance at 0 HP, item drop, pocket dimension, and active-instance limit are not first-class data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Extend summon fields for initiative, ally relationship, prohibited attacks, allowed actions, form statistics, 0-HP disappearance, item drop behavior, dismissal modes, and one-active-instance limit.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Extend runtime summon data beyond formOptions/sharedSenses/specialActions to encode the familiar's combat and lifecycle rules.

findings.issue: The familiar is explicitly an ally to the caster and the caster's allies, but ally relationship is not represented as runtime relationship data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon relationship fields for ally-to-caster and ally-to-caster-allies.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime relationship data for familiar ally status.

findings.issue: The familiar uses the chosen form's statistics, disappears at 0 Hit Points, and leaves worn or carried objects behind when it disappears.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon stat source, zero-HP behavior, and worn/carried item drop fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime stat source and disappearance/drop behavior for the familiar.

findings.issue: The specified creature types' attack disadvantage is now represented as disadvantage_on_attacks, but the target's conditional Advantage on new saves against existing possession, Charmed, or Frightened effects is not first-class data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional save-advantage fields scoped to existing possessed/charmed/frightened effects from specified creature types.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed one mismatch by changing defenseType from advantage_on_saves to disadvantage_on_attacks; add separate runtime conditionalSaveAdvantage data for already-active relevant effects.

findings.issue: The protection prevents possession by specified creature types, but possession immunity is not represented as structured or runtime data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add possession immunity fields scoped by source creature type.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime possessionImmunity data for Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, and Undead sources.

findings.issue: Unseen Servant appears in an unoccupied space on the ground, but runtime targeting does not expose unoccupied-space or ground placement constraints.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon placement fields for unoccupied space and on-ground requirement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placementFilter data for unoccupied ground space.

findings.issue: The servant must appear on the ground; runtime has no placement surface field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add placement surface fields for summons/created entities.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placementSurface ground.

findings.issue: The servant is Invisible, but invisibility is only prose inside objectDescription and not a status/visibility field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned entity visibility/status fields for Invisible.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon.statuses or visibility value for Invisible.

findings.issue: Unseen Servant is represented as a summon, but size, invisibility, mindless/shapeless force traits, AC, HP, Strength, no-attack rule, task completion/wait behavior, command range ending, and 0-HP ending are not first-class fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Extend summon/control fields for creature/object stats, traits, allowed/prohibited actions, command behavior, and lifecycle ending rules.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Extend runtime summon data beyond objectDescription with stats, traits, command options, task behavior, and ending conditions.

findings.issue: The servant has AC 10, 1 Hit Point, Strength 2, cannot attack, and the spell ends at 0 HP; runtime stores these only in objectDescription.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon stat fields for AC, HP, ability scores, attack prohibition, and 0-HP spell ending.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon stats and zeroHpEnding data.

findings.issue: The servant is Invisible, mindless, shapeless, and Medium, but those traits/states are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned entity trait/status fields for Invisible, mindless, shapeless, and size.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon traits and size data.

findings.issue: Calm Emotions lets the caster choose one of two effects separately for each failed-save Humanoid, but structured markdown and runtime JSON flatten those per-creature choices into one utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-target mode choice fields for save-gated utility/status effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlOptions or statusChoice data for the immunity/suppression mode and the indifference mode.

findings.issue: The Indifferent attitude shift, chosen creatures it applies toward, hostile prerequisite, damage/witnessed-damage break condition, and attitude restoration are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social-attitude fields for attitude state, attitude target set, prerequisite attitude, break events, and restoration behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attitudeChange data for Indifferent toward chosen creatures plus damage/witness break conditions.

findings.issue: Find Steed has steed appearance choice, Celestial/Fey/Fiend type choice, disappeared-steed versus different-steed recast choice, and type-specific traits/actions; runtime only stores shallow form/type prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon choice fields for appearance, creature type, recast return/new choice, and type-gated traits/actions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonChoices and typeSpecificFeatures data for Celestial, Fey, and Fiend.

findings.issue: The steed uses the caster's spell attack modifier for Otherworldly Slam and spell save DC for Fell Glare, but these attack/save formulas are only in higher-level prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon action attack/save formula fields that can reference caster spell attack modifier and spell save DC.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonActions for Otherworldly Slam and Fell Glare with caster-derived attack bonus/save DC.

findings.issue: The summon appears in an unoccupied space, and Fey Step teleports steed and rider to an unoccupied space; unoccupied-space requirements are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add unoccupied-space placement fields for summons and teleport destinations.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placement.requiresUnoccupied and Fey Step destination requirements.

findings.issue: The steed has Telepathy 1 mile that works only with the caster; runtime telepathy range has been corrected numerically but no communication restriction field exists.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon communication fields for telepathy range and allowed participants.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication data for caster-only telepathy range 1 mile.

findings.issue: Fey Step teleports the steed and rider up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space and recharges after Long Rest, but type-gated teleport action data is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon action fields for type-gated teleport, rider inclusion, distance, destination, and recharge.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Fey Step action data.

findings.issue: Fell Glare, Fey Step, and Healing Touch each recharge after Long Rest, and Life Bond triggers from the caster regaining HP from level 1+ spells; these recharge/trigger resources are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon action recharge fields and linked healing trigger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime recharge after Long Rest for type-gated actions and Life Bond trigger data.

findings.issue: Life Bond mirrors qualifying healing to the steed, and Celestial Healing Touch restores 2d8 plus spell level; neither healing mechanic is typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked healing trigger fields and summon action healing fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Life Bond healing mirror and Healing Touch action data.

findings.issue: Runtime stat block now has level-2 AC/HP corrected, but the formulas AC 10 + spell level, HP 5 + 10 per spell level, Hit Dice count, fly speed at spell level 4+, and disappearance at 0 HP/caster death are not formulaic data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon stat formula fields and lifecycle disappearance fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime stat formulas and disappearance conditions instead of fixed AC/HP only.

findings.issue: If the caster is Incapacitated, the steed changes turn behavior; Fiend Fell Glare can Frighten a target until the end of the caster's next turn. Both are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add condition-gated summon behavior and type-gated status action fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime incapacitatedBehavior and Fell Glare Frightened status data.

findings.issue: The spell does not grant travel, but it does grant planar perception into the Ethereal Plane, which current runtime data only stores in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar perception fields distinct from planar travel fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarPerception data for Ethereal Plane visibility.

findings.issue: See Invisibility grants specific sensory permissions and a planar perception payload, but those permissions are not typed for runtime use.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensory override fields for condition visibility, seen target categories, planar perception plane, and optional presentation cue.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensoryOverride/planarPerception data for Invisible creatures/objects and Ethereal Plane sight.

findings.issue: Spiritual Weapon creates a persistent controlled force, but runtime has no entity-like representation for its position, movement, reach, or attacks from that position.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled force/entity fields for starting space, movement speed, attack reach, repeat attack action cost, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledEntity or createdForce data and link the repeated attack to that force.

findings.issue: Summon Beast requires choosing Air, Land, or Water, and that choice changes movement, traits, HP, and other stat-block details.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon mode/stat-block variant fields for Air, Land, and Water.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonOptions data keyed by chosen environment.

findings.issue: The summoned spirit's attack bonus uses the caster's spell attack modifier, and Pack Tactics can grant Advantage for Land/Water forms; runtime has no typed summon attack/stat-block data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon attack fields for attack bonus source, reach, damage formula, multiattack count, and Pack Tactics advantage condition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon stat block attack data instead of prose-only utility text.

findings.issue: The Air form's Flyby trait prevents Opportunity Attacks when it flies out of enemy reach, but runtime has no typed summon trait data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon trait fields for Opportunity Attack avoidance by movement mode.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon trait data for Air-only Flyby.

findings.issue: The spirit must manifest in an unoccupied visible space within range, but runtime only targets a point.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add unoccupied-space and visible-space eligibility fields for summons.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon placement filters for unoccupied and visible space.

findings.issue: The summoned spirit has Darkvision 60 feet, but the runtime has no typed summoned-creature senses.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon senses fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon stat block senses with Darkvision 60 feet.

findings.issue: The spirit understands the languages the caster knows and obeys verbal commands with no action required; language understanding and command channel are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon communication fields for understood languages and verbal command cost.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon command/language data.

findings.issue: The bestial spirit's placement, ally status, initiative, default Dodge behavior, verbal command obedience, disappearance rules, and stat-block variants are flattened into utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon entity fields for stat block, initiative timing, ally relation, command behavior, default action, and disappearance conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON/summonEntity data instead of a generic UTILITY effect.

findings.issue: Ally status, understood languages, and command obedience are summon-control mechanics currently stored as prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon allegiance and command-understanding fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon allegiance and command data.

findings.issue: The summoned spirit's AC, HP, speeds, senses, passive Perception, proficiency bonus, and attack/damage formulas are all stat-block values flattened into text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon stat-block fields with formulas by spell level and chosen environment.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon stat block data for AC, HP, speeds, senses, PB, attacks, and damage.

findings.issue: Animate Dead chooses between bones and corpse, which determines Skeleton versus Zombie output; runtime only stores this in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add source-material mode fields for bones_to_skeleton and corpse_to_zombie.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon/sourceMode data for Skeleton versus Zombie creation.

findings.issue: The spell creates Skeleton or Zombie servants, controls them for 24 hours, supports shared commands, default Dodge behavior, and task persistence; runtime has only a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add undead summon/control fields for creature output, control duration, command behavior, default action, and task continuation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonEntity/control data for animated undead.

findings.issue: The spell creates a Large spectral intangible pack that lasts for the duration and moves when the caster moves; runtime still contains older summon-style prose and lacks 2024 pack data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conjured pack fields for size, intangibility, movement coupling, threat radius, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace old summon creature prose with runtime conjuredPack data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Created structures, wards, huts, mounts, or servants need durable object/entity fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created object/structure/entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current summon/utility/terrain data as interim representation.

findings.issue: Stored spell summon/object/trap placement and attack behavior are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add storedSpellPayload behavior fields for hostile summons, harmful objects, traps, placement, and target behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime storedSpellBehavior data for hostile summoned/created payloads.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon/controlled-entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Phantom Steed has caster-chosen appearance and rider eligibility choices that are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon appearance choice and allowed rider fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonAppearanceChoice and allowedRiderChoice data.

findings.issue: The quasi-real illusory nature and appearance decision are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add quasiReal/illusion summon presentation fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonPresentation quasiReal and appearanceChoice.

findings.issue: Phantom Steed summons a rideable creature with a modified stat block, but runtime does not have typed summon data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon fields for base stat block, size, equipment, speed override, travel pace, and rider rules.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON data using Riding Horse with Speed 100 and travel 13 miles/hour.

findings.issue: The steed movement and overland travel values are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned mount speed and travel pace fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime mountMovement speed 100 feet and travel 13 miles per hour.

findings.issue: The one-minute dismount grace after the spell ends is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-end aftermath fields for summoned mount fade and dismount grace.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath fadeOut with riderDismountWindow 1 minute.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Created structures, wards, huts, mounts, or servants need durable object/entity fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created object/structure/entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current summon/utility/terrain data as interim representation.

findings.issue: The animating-spirit distinction limits what the corpse can know and do, but is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add corpseAnimation state fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime corpseState animatingSpiritOnly and soulNotReturned.

findings.issue: Answer truthfulness depends on social relationship, but runtime has no field for this.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add answerTruthfulness condition fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime answerBehavior data for no truth compulsion when antagonistic or enemy-recognized.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon/controlled-entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: The spell animates plants for limited commands without uprooting movement, but runtime has no plant state/control data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plant sentience/animation command fields and no-uproot movement limit.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantAnimation data for limited sentience, simple commands, branch/tendril/stalk movement, and cannotUproot.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Communication rules need sender/recipient, language, plane, and message-shape fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon/controlled-entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Costs, spell storage, triggers, or resources need non-component resource fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resource/cost/spell-storage bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current component/utility fields as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object stats, structure durability, or object transformations need explicit AC/HP/passability/damageability fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object stat/damageability bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current spatial/utility fields until propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Some ending conditions are represented in prose/options but need reusable break-condition fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing duration/utility/status break fields as interim data.

findings.issue: Summon Lesser Demons uses a random summon-count/CR table, DM monster selection, and caster placement choices that are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add random summon table, DM choice, and chosen placement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonTable d6 outcomes, dmChoosesCreature, and casterChosenUnoccupiedSpaces.

findings.issue: The placement targets are multiple unoccupied visible spaces, but runtime has one ground target.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add multi-placement target fields for summons.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placementTargets unoccupied visible spaces within 60 feet with count from summon table.

findings.issue: The optional blood circle is a ground ward that restricts summoned demons, but it is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add optional ground ward/circle fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime bloodCircle option with protected area around caster.

findings.issue: The summon count, CR cap, hostile behavior, group initiative, own turns, targeting behavior, and higher-slot multipliers are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon table, behavior, initiative, hostility, and slot multiplier fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON data for table outcomes, hostileToAll, groupInitiative, ownTurns, attackNearestNonDemons, and level 6-7 x2 / 8-9 x3 count scaling.

findings.issue: The blood component has optional delayed consumption if used to form the circle.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional material consumption fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime componentConsumption conditional on bloodCircleUsed at spell end.

findings.issue: Summoned demons disappear at 0 HP, which requires typed summon lifecycle data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon disappearance conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonLifecycle disappearsAt0Hp and onSpellEnd.

findings.issue: Summon lifecycle endings and optional material consumption at spell end are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon lifecycle and conditional component consumption fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifecycle/consumption data tied to spell end and demon HP 0.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Created structures, wards, huts, mounts, or servants need durable object/entity fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created object/structure/entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current summon/utility/terrain data as interim representation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon/controlled-entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: The detector matched action language; the actual mechanic is a bonus-action command channel for the servant.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled summon command action/range fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime commandAction bonus_action range 120 feet mental.

findings.issue: Tiny Servant transforms an object into a controlled creature with command/default behavior, but runtime does not type the summon.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated object summon fields for stat block, control, command behavior, default defend behavior, and persistent order.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMON/animatedObject data with Tiny Servant stats and command behavior.

findings.issue: Tiny Servant has a 0 HP reversion with excess damage carryover to the original object.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated object lifecycle and damage carryover fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifecycle revertsAt0Hp and carryoverDamageToOriginalObject.

findings.issue: The aura grants Advantage on saving throws against effects that cause specific conditions; runtime now has a defensive advantage effect, but it cannot type the condition-causing filter.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-advantage filter fields keyed to caused conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveAdvantage filters for effects causing Blinded, Charmed, Deafened, Frightened, Paralyzed, Poisoned, or Stunned.

findings.issue: Creatures in the aura can't become diseased, but runtime has no typed disease-prevention or condition-prevention field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add prevention fields for disease immunity and condition-causing effect filters.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime prevention data for disease and condition-causing effects.

findings.issue: The spell conjures spirits from the Elemental Planes that flit around the caster, but runtime models only the damage and terrain outputs, not the spirit aura entity.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura-spirit manifestation fields for non-commanded conjured spirits.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime auraManifestation data for Elemental spirits.

findings.issue: The spell conjures nature spirits that flit around the caster, but runtime models the damage and Disengage outputs rather than the spirit aura manifestation.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura-spirit manifestation fields for non-commanded conjured spirits.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime auraManifestation data for nature spirits.

findings.issue: The mount appears in an unoccupied space within range, but runtime targets generic creatures and lacks placement-space eligibility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon placement fields for unoccupied space within range.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon placement data and consider validTargets point/unoccupied_space rather than creatures.

findings.issue: The mount disappears at 0 HP, recast restores all HP and removes conditions, and disappearing leaves behind worn/carried objects; runtime lacks typed HP/lifecycle/equipment handling.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bonded summon defeat/recast/equipment fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime mountLifecycle and equipmentDrop data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses centipede, spider, or wasp, and the form changes stat-block details; runtime lacks typed form options.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon form option fields with form-specific abilities.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon.formOptions data for centipede/spider/wasp.

findings.issue: The stat block includes spell-attack-based attacks, a spell-save-DC Constitution save, Spider Climb with no ability check, and level-derived multiattack; runtime only has prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned stat-block action fields for attack bonus source, save DC source, form-specific actions, and level-derived multiattack.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon statBlock actions and scaling.

findings.issue: The insect manifests in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range; runtime has point targeting but no typed unoccupied-space placement rule.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon placement eligibility fields for unoccupied visible space.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonPlacement data.

findings.issue: Spider Climb lets the insect climb difficult surfaces and ceilings without an ability check; runtime lacks form-specific movement traits.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned creature movement trait fields for spider climb and form-specific speeds.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon movementTraits data.

findings.issue: The insect understands the languages the caster knows; runtime lacks typed summoned-language fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned language inheritance fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon.languages data.

findings.issue: The spell summons an allied creature with initiative timing, no-action verbal commands, default Dodge and danger avoidance, form options, scaled stats, and form-specific actions; runtime is still a generic utility effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add full summoned entity fields for allegiance, initiative, command economy, default behavior, form options, stats, and actions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMONING or summonEntity data for Giant Insect.

findings.issue: The insect is allied to the caster and allies and understands the caster's languages; runtime lacks typed allegiance and language inheritance.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned allegiance and language fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon.allegiance and summon.languages data.

findings.issue: The stat block has AC, HP, speed, senses, attacks, save actions, and spell-level scaling; runtime lacks typed summon stats.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned stat-block fields with spell-level formulas.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon.statBlock data.

findings.issue: The spell creates a target-only fear illusion that drives damage and disadvantage, but runtime has no typed illusion payload beyond prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add hostile illusion fields for visible-to-target-only, fear manifestation, and linked damage/rider effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hostileIllusion data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses a demon type of challenge rating 5 or lower, and higher-level casting raises that CR limit by 1 per slot level above 4th; runtime has no typed summon option or CR-scaling fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon choice fields for creature type family, CR cap, examples, and slot-level CR scaling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon.formOptions or summonChoice data with CR cap and scaling.

findings.issue: The demon appears in an unoccupied space the caster can see within range, but runtime targets generic creatures and lacks unoccupied-space placement eligibility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon placement fields for visible unoccupied space within spell range.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonPlacement data and consider point/unoccupied-space targeting for summon spells.

findings.issue: The optional blood circle is formed on the ground, encompasses the caster's space, and blocks the demon from crossing, harming, or targeting inside it; runtime lacks protective-circle terrain/barrier fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add protective circle/barrier fields for ground placement, enclosed space, crossing restrictions, harm restrictions, targeting restrictions, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime protectiveCircle data if the blood is used that way.

findings.issue: The material component is normally not consumed, but if used to form the protective circle it is consumed when the spell ends; runtime has only a single isConsumed false flag.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional material consumption fields tied to optional sub-effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalConsumption data for using the blood to form the circle.

findings.issue: The caster chooses a variable number of eligible objects, with Medium-or-smaller objects counting as one, Large as two, Huge as three, and the total budget equal to spellcasting ability modifier; runtime lacks object-count budget and size-weighting fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add multi-object choice fields for count budget source, size weights, and maximum object size.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedObjectSelection data.

findings.issue: Animated Object Slam uses the caster's spell attack modifier, size-based damage formulas, and higher-slot damage increases by size; runtime stores these stat-block attack details only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated/summoned stat-block action fields for attack bonus source, damage formulas by size, and size-specific scaling dice.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedObject.actions and scaling data.

findings.issue: Animated objects understand the languages the caster knows and receive mental commands within 500 feet; runtime lacks typed summoned-language and command-channel fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity language inheritance and mental command fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedObject.languages and commandChannel data.

findings.issue: The spell creates controlled Construct creatures with shared initiative, ally status, bonus-action mental commands, multi-target same-command control, default Dodge/harm-avoidance behavior, stat block details, and object reversion; runtime is still generic utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated controlled-entity fields for entity type, control, initiative, command economy, default behavior, stat block, allegiance, and lifecycle.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedEntity data.

findings.issue: Each animated creature is allied to the caster and allies and understands the caster's languages; runtime lacks typed allegiance and language inheritance.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity allegiance and language fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime allegiance and languages data.

findings.issue: Animated objects have AC 15, size-based HP, speed, immunities, senses, language understanding, proficiency-bonus relationship, Slam attacks, 0-HP reversion, and damage carryover; runtime lacks typed durability/stat-block/object-reversion data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated object stat-block, durability, and reversion fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedObject.statBlock, hp, damageCarryover, and reversion data.

findings.issue: Animated objects are immune to Poison and Psychic damage and to Charmed, Exhaustion, Frightened, Paralyzed, and Poisoned; runtime lacks typed summoned-condition and damage immunities.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity immunity fields for damage types and conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedObject.immunities data.

findings.issue: The spell creates a commanded Large force hand with movement, modes, object stats, grapple, cover, blocking, and conditional terrain; runtime is generic utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created controlled-object/entity fields for the hand.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdHand data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses air, earth, fire, or water, which determines Lightning, Thunder, Fire, or Cold damage; runtime has variable damage but no typed element-to-damage option map.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked summon mode fields for element choice and resulting damage type.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime elementalSpiritOptions data.

findings.issue: The spell creates a Large intangible elemental spirit with element modes, duration, placement, save-triggered damage, one-restrained-creature capacity, and repeat-save behavior; runtime has only a generic damage effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created spirit/hazard fields for identity, element choice, placement, trigger rules, capacity, and lifecycle.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime elementalSpirit data.

findings.issue: Animated corpses gain a bonus to attack and damage rolls equal to the caster's spellcasting ability modifier; runtime lacks controlled-undead stat modifier fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned/animated creature attack and damage bonus fields sourced from spellcasting ability modifier.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedUndead.attackDamageBonus data.

findings.issue: The spell animates up to five Small or Medium corpses as zombies or skeletons, controls them with bonus-action mental commands, gives default defensive behavior, persists orders until task completion, and scales by two corpses per higher slot; runtime is generic utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated undead fields for corpse eligibility, count, size, form choice, stat block reference, command economy, default behavior, task persistence, and slot scaling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedUndead data.

findings.issue: The created undead remain under control until the spell ends, then become inanimate; runtime lacks spell-end reversion/lifecycle data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated creature lifecycle ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedUndead.lifecycle data.

findings.issue: Hallowed Ward blocks chosen creature types from willingly entering and suppresses possession/Charmed/Frightened from those types; runtime lacks typed ward-entry and ward-suppression fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward-entry restriction and ward-status-suppression fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hallowedWard data.

findings.issue: Hallow can prevent Frightened, impose Frightened, suppress Charmed/Frightened/possessed states from warded creatures, and prevent dead bodies from becoming Undead; runtime lacks typed status-prevention/status-application/body-state fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area status prevention, status application, possession suppression, and corpse-state protection fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hallowStatusModes data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses a devil type by CR, and talisman possession changes the allowed CR and obedience behavior; runtime preserves these mode choices only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon choice fields for creature type, CR cap, talisman-specific summon, and altered obedience.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime infernalSummonOptions data.

findings.issue: The devil must appear in an unoccupied visible space within range; runtime has lineOfSight but lacks unoccupied-space eligibility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon destination eligibility fields for visible and unoccupied spaces.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonDestination data.

findings.issue: Successful commands can include message-bearing and the devil returns to report completion; runtime lacks typed command/report communication fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned-entity command communication and completion report fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonCommandCommunication data.

findings.issue: The devil disappears at 0 hit points, but runtime lacks typed summoned-entity hit-point/despawn behavior.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned-entity despawn conditions for 0 hit points and normal spell ending.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonDespawn data.

findings.issue: If concentration ends after command immunity, the devil acts freely for 3d6 minutes before disappearing; runtime lacks post-concentration aftermath behavior.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon aftermath fields for post-control independent behavior and delayed disappearance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonAftermath data.

findings.issue: The death-triggered zombie is a created/controlled entity aftermath and remains prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-triggered zombie creation fields with behavior and timing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime zombieAftermath summon/entity data.

findings.issue: Commands may include message delivery and completion reporting, with hostile literalism, but runtime lacks typed command/report fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bound-entity command and report fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime boundEntityCommand data.

findings.issue: Runtime now has the Bound state, but the service obligation, extension of another summon spell's duration, hostile literalism, and instruction completion behavior remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bound-entity service fields distinct from generic status conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarBindingControl data.

findings.issue: The bound creature travels to report completion on the same plane or returns to the binding place if on another plane; runtime lacks typed travel/report behavior.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add completion travel/report fields with same-plane branching.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime boundEntityCompletionTravel data.

findings.issue: Completion before spell end changes the creature's behavior, and another summon/creation spell's duration can be extended to match Planar Binding; runtime lacks those conditional duration/ending branches.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bound-service completion and linked-spell duration-extension fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarBindingDurationLink data.

findings.issue: The spell fails if the soul is not free or willing; runtime lacks this failure condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add soul availability failure fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime resurrectionFailure data.

findings.issue: The cube's trees, rocks, grasses, and undergrowth become animated until the spell ends, but runtime lacks typed environmental animation state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental animation fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedNatureArea data.

findings.issue: Runtime now targets a point and summons a Medium Fey spirit, but the initial and later teleport destinations still need first-class unoccupied-visible-space eligibility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summoned-entity placement eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonedEntityPlacement data.

findings.issue: The user-defined trigger, first trigger firing, forced activation whether desired or not, self-only contingent spell target, one-contingency limit, recast replacement, and component-possession ending are all prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add contingent trigger, firing, replacement, self-targeting, and component-dependency fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime contingencyTrigger data.

findings.issue: Runtime now records three targets and command options, but animate-vs-reassert-control mode and higher-slot corpse/undead-form choices remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animate/reassert mode and slot-scaled undead form choice fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime undeadAnimationModes data.

findings.issue: Command action economy is represented, but animated undead stat-block identities, 24-hour control expiry, reassert-control window, default Dodge/move behavior, and slot-scaled Ghoul/Ghast/Wight/Mummy options remain under-modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated-undead entity and control-duration fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedUndeadControl data.

findings.issue: The Invisible object mark and invisible sapphire inscription are not typed as object visibility/marking state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add invisible object mark and linked-token inscription fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectMarking data.

findings.issue: Crushing the sapphire can teleport the object to the caster's hand regardless of physical or planar distance, but fails if another creature holds or carries it; runtime lacks linked-object teleportation and blocked-transport fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked object teleport, planar distance, and holder-blocked transport fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime instantSummonsLink data.

findings.issue: If another creature holds or carries the object, the caster learns who that creature is and where it is currently located; runtime lacks holder identity/location knowledge fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked-object holder identity/location knowledge fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime instantSummonsHolderKnowledge data.

findings.issue: The target object gains an Invisible mark and the sapphire gains an invisible inscription of the object's name; runtime lacks linked status/state data for either item.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked item mark/inscription state fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime instantSummonsState data.

findings.issue: Fog, grasping undergrowth, animated trees, wind, spike growth, and harmless/soft variants for immune creatures alter the warded environment but are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward environmental subeffect fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime druidGroveEnvironment data.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, animated trees take root again if possible; runtime lacks this aftermath state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add guardian reroot aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime guardianAftermath data.

findings.issue: Possession requires a visible Humanoid within 100 feet and excludes creatures warded by Protection from Evil and Good or Magic Circle; runtime only records this as utility option prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add secondary action target filters and ward-exclusion fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime possessionTargetFilter data.

findings.issue: The possessed creature's soul perceives from the container using its own senses; runtime records this in utility/status prose but lacks a first-class perception-origin field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add soul/perception-origin fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime alternatePerceptionOrigin data.

findings.issue: Requesting a named creature is represented as a utility option, but runtime lacks a first-class named-creature request field and DM-choice substitution outcome.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add requested creature/name and substitution outcome fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime requestedSummonIdentity data.

findings.issue: The ally must be a Celestial, Elemental, or Fiend loyal to the known entity and appear in an unoccupied space; runtime records form options but lacks loyalty/source and unoccupied-placement fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon source/loyalty and unoccupied placement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonSourceEntity and summonPlacement data.

findings.issue: The creature appears but is not compelled to behave; runtime records SUMMONING and utility prose, but lacks first-class uncontrolled summoned ally/negotiated service state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled/uncontrolled summon and negotiated-service fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime negotiatedSummonService data.

findings.issue: Known cosmic power, named request, bargain terms, ethos alignment, suicidal task refusal, and DM-adjusted payment are social/knowledge mechanics represented as utility options but not first-class data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bargain/social constraint fields for service spells.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime bargainConstraints data.

findings.issue: The spell triggers when a visible Humanoid within 60 feet dies, and Eyes of the Dead requires a place the humanoid saw in life on the current plane; runtime records this in options but lacks death-trigger and memory-place eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-trigger, creature type, and remembered-place eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathTriggerSoulCapture and rememberedPlaceEligibility data.

findings.issue: The soul only knows what it knew in life and must answer truthfully to the best of its ability; runtime lacks knowledge-source and truthfulness fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge-source/truthfulness answer fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgeAnswerConstraint data.

findings.issue: The dead humanoid cannot be revived while the soul is trapped; runtime records this as an option but lacks first-class revival prevention.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add revival prevention fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime revivalPrevention data.

findings.issue: The base spell can target a creature, but only a Humanoid killed by the spell rises as a Zombie; runtime stores this in summon/utility target filters while the allowed condition enum cannot express target killed by spell.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-triggered target filter fields for conditional riders.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathTriggeredRider data keyed to creature type and cause of death.

findings.issue: The 100 invulnerable servants are represented as SUMMONING plus utility options, but runtime lacks first-class noncombat-servant capability limits, invulnerability, and cannot-harm rules.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add noncombat servant capability and restriction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime servantCapabilityRules data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Astral body/body split, replicated statistics/possessions, and silver-cord death linkage need a dedicated linked-entity or dual-body schema to avoid remaining as utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a linked form/body state bucket that can model an astral form, a suspended physical body, copied stats/equipment, and lethal cord linkage.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add a structured linkedEntities or formSplit runtime object; current JSON keeps the facts in Utility Options and Unconscious status.

groups.title: AI Arbitration Or Custom Resolution
groups.closureRule: The finding likely cannot be captured with current deterministic schema without custom or AI-arbitrated handling.

findings.issue: Message supports one-target private whisper plus target reply, but JSON only records a prose utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication fields for private target-only delivery and one-reply permission.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication data for target-only hearing and target reply.

findings.issue: Message can pass through solid objects only if the caster is familiar with the target and knows it is beyond the barrier.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication through-barrier prerequisite fields for familiarity and known target location.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime prerequisite data for through-barrier casting.

findings.issue: Mold Earth can spell out words on dirt or stone, which is a world-state communication/marking effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Represent as surface-marking text support rather than generic communication.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceMarking text capability.

findings.issue: Mold Earth changes terrain state and earth placement in the world.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Track world-state earth/terrain changes explicitly.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime world-state terrain change data.

findings.issue: The created trinket can deal no damage and has no monetary worth, which is a created-object restriction.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-object restriction fields for damage capability and monetary worth.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdObject restrictions.

findings.issue: Arms of Hadar suppresses all reactions until the start of the target's next turn on a failed Strength save; the status rider now uses negates_condition, but still relies on a broad Reactions Suppressed status with inappropriate default repeat-save/escape sentinels.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Use reaction restriction fields for all-reaction suppression, failed-save gate, and until-start-of-target-next-turn duration, with not_applicable repeat-save/escape fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime reactionRestriction data or narrow status metadata; clear repeatSave/escapeCheck placeholders once not_applicable sentinels exist.

findings.issue: The spell starts eligible flammable objects burning, which is a persistent world-state/environmental effect not represented structurally.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add burning/ignition environmental state fields for objects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime burning state application for eligible objects.

findings.issue: Charm Person makes the Charmed creature Friendly and later aware it was Charmed by the caster; the runtime has a generic utility description but no structured friendly-state or awareness payload.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social disposition fields for Friendly-to-caster and aftermath awareness fields for knows-charmed-by-caster.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime socialDisposition and aftermathAwareness data.

findings.issue: When Charm Person ends, the target knows it was Charmed by the caster; this aftermath knowledge is not structured.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath awareness fields for target knowledge after spell end.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath data recording that the target knows it was Charmed by the caster.

findings.issue: Comprehend Languages requires touching the surface that contains written language, but this prerequisite is only stored in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add written-language reading fields for surface-touch requirement and read rate.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime languageUnderstanding data for written text requiring touched surface.

findings.issue: Comprehend Languages grants literal meaning only, reads about one page per minute, and does not decode symbols or secret messages; these communication limitations are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication/language fields for literal-meaning-only, page read rate, and no-symbol-or-secret-message decoding.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication/language limitation data for these constraints.

findings.issue: The caster can remotely see and hear through the familiar and gains its special senses, but the runtime only stores sharedSenses as a coarse boolean.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote perception fields for shared sight/hearing, special-sense inheritance, range, action cost, and end timing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime shared-sense details instead of a boolean-only sharedSenses flag.

findings.issue: Fog Cloud's fog sphere, strong-wind dispersal, and slot scaling are represented, but the Heavily Obscured visibility state is still flattened into terrainType obscuring.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add explicit obscurity-level fields for terrain/environmental effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime obscurityLevel: heavily_obscured or equivalent instead of relying only on terrainType obscuring.

findings.issue: Hunter's Mark improves finding the marked target with Perception or Survival checks, but the tracking knowledge/search benefit is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add tracking/search benefit fields for marked quarry effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trackingBenefit or abilityCheckModifier data scoped to finding the marked target.

findings.issue: Purify Food and Drink removes poison and rot from nonmagical food and drink in an area, but runtime JSON only stores a generic creation utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add food/drink purification fields for contaminant types, nonmagical restriction, and area scope.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime purification data for poison and rot removal from nonmagical food and drink.

findings.issue: Snare creates a 5-foot-radius magic trap circle on the ground or floor, but runtime JSON only stores area targeting and a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trap surface fields for ground/floor placement, circle radius, and rope-to-trap transformation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trapSurface data for ground/floor circle placement.

findings.issue: Cloud of Daggers lets the caster use a later-turn Magic action to teleport the Cube up to 30 feet, and creatures take damage if the Cube moves into their space; runtime now has initial/enter/end-turn damage but lacks movable-area data and an area-moves-into-target trigger.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movable area fields for later-turn Magic action relocation distance and damage trigger when the area moves into a creature's space.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movableArea data and a trigger type for an area moving into a creature's space.

findings.issue: The ammunition is planted in the ground in the caster's space and cannot be physically uprooted, but that terrain/object anchoring is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planted/anchored object fields for ground placement and uproot prevention.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantedObject data for ammunition placement and cannot-uproot trait.

findings.issue: The spell changes the local battlefield by planting persistent ammunition traps, but persistent placed trap objects are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add placed trap/object fields for persistent world-state hazards.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placedTrap data for ammunition in the caster's space.

findings.issue: The sphere rolls along the ground, can cross barriers up to 5 feet and pits up to 10 feet, but those traversal rules are only spatial notes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movable terrain traversal fields for ground-only rolling, barrier height, and pit width limits.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movableArea traversal data.

findings.issue: Flammable unattended objects start burning when touched by the sphere, but ignition/world-state change is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ignition fields for flammable unattended objects touched by an effect.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange ignition data for flammable objects not worn or carried.

findings.issue: Gentle Repose prevents decay, prevents becoming Undead, and pauses days counting against resurrection time limits; runtime stores all of this in utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add corpse/remains preservation fields for no decay, cannot become Undead, and resurrection time-limit pause.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime preservation data for decay prevention, undead prevention, and raise-dead time-limit suspension.

findings.issue: Gentle Repose targets a corpse or remains, but runtime cannot express corpse/remains as a valid target type.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add corpse/remains target values and not_applicable sentinel handling where target kind does not apply.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime valid target support for corpse/remains instead of using creatures.

findings.issue: Any creature in physical contact with the heated object takes damage, but physical-contact targeting is not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add contact-with-target-object condition fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime contactCondition data for creatures in physical contact with the heated object.

findings.issue: Knock unlocks, unsticks, or unbars one access-preventing mechanism and suppresses Arcane Lock for 10 minutes, but these object/access state changes are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add lock/access state fields for mundane unlock/unstick/unbar, one-lock limit, and Arcane Lock suppression duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime accessControl data for object categories, one mechanism affected, and Arcane Lock suppression 10 minutes.

findings.issue: Knock only works on objects that contain mundane or magical means preventing access, but runtime target eligibility is generic objects.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object target eligibility fields for access-preventing mechanisms and example categories.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectEligibility accessPreventingMechanism true with categories door, box, chest, manacles, padlock, other.

findings.issue: Magic Mouth stores a spoken message of up to 25 words, can deliver it over up to 10 minutes, uses the caster's voice and spoken volume, and may use an existing mouth-like feature; runtime only has summary prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add stored message fields for max words, max delivery duration, voice/volume preservation, mouth appearance, and object-mouth anchoring.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime storedMessage data for word limit, delivery duration, voice, volume, and mouth placement.

findings.issue: Moonbeam has a failed-save state rider for shape-shifted creatures that is not represented structurally.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add shape-shift reversion and shape-shift suppression fields with until-leaves-area duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime shapeshiftSuppression data tied to failed save.

findings.issue: False Aura changes the knowledge returned by Detect Magic-like effects, but there is no first-class magical-aura spoofing payload.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add magical detection spoof fields for appearsMagical, appearsNonmagical, and school override.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime auraSpoof data for object detection results.

findings.issue: The spell extinguishes nonmagical flame in a 5-foot cube, creates smoke in a 20-foot radius moving around corners, and smoke persists 1 minute or until strong wind disperses it; these world-state changes are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add flame target/extinguish fields and smoke cloud fields for radius, corner movement, duration, and wind dispersal.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange data for extinguishFlame and Smoke cloud.

findings.issue: The rope's upper end hovers until it hangs perpendicular or reaches a ceiling; this object repositioning and orientation rule is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object movement/orientation fields for touched objects that hover or reposition without creature movement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectMotion data for the rope end rising, perpendicular hanging, and ceiling stop condition.

findings.issue: The rope must hang perpendicular or stop at a ceiling, making ceiling collision and hanging orientation mechanically relevant.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object placement constraint fields for ceiling stop and vertical hanging orientation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placement constraints for rope orientation and ceiling interaction.

findings.issue: Creatures inside the extradimensional space can see through the portal, but external visibility through the portal is not reciprocal.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add one-way portal perception fields for inside-to-outside sight.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime portalPerception data for occupants seeing out through the entrance.

findings.issue: Skywrite creates up to ten words as a persistent public message, but runtime only stores this communication as a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add public written-message fields for maximum word count, medium, placement, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication/message data for up to ten cloud words.

findings.issue: Spider Climb grants movement across vertical surfaces and ceilings while leaving hands free, plus a Climb Speed equal to Speed; runtime stores this only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement grant fields for vertical surfaces, ceilings, hands-free climbing, and climb speed equal to base Speed.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementGrant data for surface traversal and climb speed.

findings.issue: Spike Growth creates difficult terrain, damaging spikes, and camouflaged hazardous ground with Search action recognition rules; runtime has a terrain effect but keeps camouflage and recognition details in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain hazard fields for difficult terrain, per-distance damage, camouflage, and Search action recognition using Perception or Survival against spell save DC.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Extend runtime TERRAIN data with camouflage and recognition-check fields.

findings.issue: The spell transforms the ground into camouflaged hazardous difficult terrain, which is a world-state terrain change not fully typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental/terrain transformation fields for ground sprouts, natural camouflage, and hazard recognition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmental terrain transformation details or extend the TERRAIN effect accordingly.

findings.issue: The suggested course of activity must be communicated in no more than 25 words; this word limit and communication payload are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spoken command/suggestion fields for maximum word count and language/hearing understanding prerequisites.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime suggestionPayload data for maxWords 25 plus hearing/understanding requirements.

findings.issue: Warding Bond's component is not consumed, but the paired rings must be worn by both linked creatures for the duration.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add component usage fields for must_be_worn_by_caster_and_target.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime componentRequirement data for paired rings worn during the effect.

findings.issue: The caster knows each save result, affected creatures are aware of the spell, and they may avoid answering while remaining truthful; these social/knowledge payloads are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for save-result awareness and affected-target awareness/evasive-answer behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledge/socialControl data for save-result disclosure, target awareness, and evasive-but-truthful answers.

findings.issue: The target remains become an Undead Skeleton or Zombie; runtime lacks a first-class transformation/animation state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object/remains-to-creature transformation fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformation data from corpse/bones to Undead creature.

findings.issue: Blink changes cross-plane perception and whether creatures on the other plane can perceive the caster; runtime has no typed planar perception/visibility barrier.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar perception and cross-plane detectability fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarVisibility data for perceiving and being perceived across planes.

findings.issue: Counterspell is a reaction to seeing a creature within 60 feet casting a spell, and failed save wastes the action, Bonus Action, or Reaction used to cast while preserving the spell slot; runtime does not expose the reaction trigger or action-waste/slot-preserve outcome.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reaction spell-interrupt fields for casting trigger, wasted action kind, and slot-not-expended outcome.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime reactionTrigger and interruptedCastOutcome data.

findings.issue: The ground becomes Difficult Terrain until cleared; terrain creation is represented, but the until-cleared world-state cleanup details are still incomplete.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental terrain cleanup fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainClearing data.

findings.issue: The Charmed target undertakes requested services in a friendly manner, can receive new tasks, and later knows it was charmed; runtime only stores Charmed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social-control task fields and post-effect awareness fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime socialControl and aftermathAwareness data.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the creature knows it was Charmed by the caster; runtime has no aftermath awareness field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath awareness fields for knows_charmed_by_caster.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermathAwareness data.

findings.issue: Flammable unattended objects in the area start Burning; runtime has no environmental ignition/status data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental ignition fields for Burning objects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange or objectState data for igniting flammable unattended objects.

findings.issue: The extra damage is now hit-triggered, but per-ammunition magic ending on hit or miss, the twelve-piece draw limit, and +2 ammunition per higher slot remain prose-only.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ammunitionPool data for 12 pieces, +2 per slot above 3, and per-piece magic ending on hit or miss.
