groups.title: Vision, Light, Sound, Or Sensory
groups.closureRule: Light, sound, visibility, senses, cover, heat, or sensory emission/suppression needs runtime data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Ignition, weather, sensory, or cosmetic environmental change needs a reusable environment/world-state bucket.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environment/world-state fields for ignition, weather, sensory phenomena, and lasting environmental facts.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep current utility/terrain/damage representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Ignition, weather, sensory, or cosmetic environmental change needs a reusable environment/world-state bucket.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environment/world-state fields for ignition, weather, sensory phenomena, and lasting environmental facts.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep current utility/terrain/damage representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Ignition, weather, sensory, or cosmetic environmental change needs a reusable environment/world-state bucket.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environment/world-state fields for ignition, weather, sensory phenomena, and lasting environmental facts.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep current utility/terrain/damage representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Mind Sliver's damage and next-save 1d4 penalty share one failed Intelligence save, but runtime JSON stores them as separate effects that can drift.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add or reuse a bundled save-penalty-with-damage field family, parallel to bundled attack-roll riders.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Bundle damage and savePenalty under one save outcome so the target does not conceptually roll twice.

findings.issue: Altered Eyes changes the caster's eye appearance for 1 minute, which is a visible body/appearance change not represented structurally.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add appearance-change utility fields for altered body feature, duration, and cosmetic-only scope.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime appearanceChange data for Altered Eyes.

findings.issue: Vicious Mockery's damage and next-attack Disadvantage rider share one failed Wisdom save, but JSON stores damage and a generic utility effect separately.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Use the ATTACK_ROLL_MODIFIER field family for outgoing next attack disadvantage bundled with damage behind one save.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace or augment the generic utility rider with runtime attackRollModifier data: disadvantage, outgoing, any attack, next_attack, until end of target's next turn, bundled with damage/save.

findings.issue: Bless adds 1d4 to attack rolls and saving throws for affected targets, but structured markdown and JSON only apply a generic Blessed status.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add attack/save bonus fields for affected roll types, dice 1d4, target duration, and concentration scope.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime rollModifier data for attack rolls and saving throws instead of relying on status-condition name semantics.

findings.issue: Burning Hands ignites flammable objects in the cone that are not worn or carried, but targeting and effects only cover creatures.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object ignition fields for flammable objects, area membership, and not-worn-or-carried exclusion.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmental/object effect data that starts burning on eligible flammable objects in the cone.

findings.issue: Color Spray's stale HP-pool utility data was removed and the Blinded status is now Constitution-save gated, but the status still uses generic one-round duration plus default repeat-save/escape placeholders rather than an explicit until-end-of-caster-next-turn duration with not_applicable sentinels.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add duration endpoint fields for until_end_of_caster_next_turn and not_applicable repeat-save/escape fields for one-save status effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status duration endpoint and replace default repeatSave/escapeCheck placeholders once supported.

findings.issue: Command requires the caster to speak a one-word command, but runtime JSON does not make the spoken-word delivery or language/understanding assumptions explicit.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add command/communication fields for spoken one-word delivery and any language-understanding requirements or exclusions discovered across command-like spells.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime commandDelivery data rather than leaving spoken one-word command only in prose.

findings.issue: Detect Magic teaches the spell school when the detected effect was created by a spell, but this knowledge payload is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for detected spell school and created-by-spell prerequisite.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledge data for learning spell school from detected spell-created effects.

findings.issue: Disguise Self has physical-inspection failure and Study action Intelligence (Investigation) reveal rules, but these reveal mechanics are only prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion/disguise reveal fields for physical interaction, Study action, Intelligence (Investigation), spell save DC, and same-limb arrangement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime disguise/illusion reveal data.

findings.issue: Entangle's Strength save is represented, but the canonical exclusion for the caster ('other than you') is not explicit in targeting or status target filters.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add caster-exclusion fields for area save/status applications.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target exclusion for caster on the Restrained save application.

findings.issue: The fog imposes the Heavily Obscured visibility state, but the runtime uses a coarse obscuring terrain type.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add obscurity-level fields for terrain and environmental visibility effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime obscurityLevel data for heavily_obscured.

findings.issue: Grease explicitly creates nonflammable grease, but runtime terrain has no flammability or fire-interaction field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental surface material fields for flammable/nonflammable state where spell prose makes it mechanical.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain flammability data for nonflammable grease.

findings.issue: Guiding Bolt grants Advantage to the next attack roll against the target before the end of the caster's next turn, but the runtime stores this as a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add attack-roll modifier fields for incoming next-attack advantage, hit-gated application, target scope, and duration until end of caster's next turn.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed one narrow mismatch by hit-gating the utility rider; add runtime ATTACK_ROLL_MODIFIER or equivalent incoming next-attack advantage data.

findings.issue: The spell can target only the creature that damaged the caster, and that relationship is not first-class target-filter data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trigger-source target fields for reaction spells where the legal target is the triggering creature.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime triggerSourceTarget data so the effect target is bound to the damaging creature.

findings.issue: Silent Image creates a movable image with size/form limits, natural movement appearance, physical-interaction reveal, Study action reveal, Investigation check against spell save DC, and see-through discerned state, but JSON stores this as one sensory utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion fields for image kind, max cube size, movement action, appearance adjustment, physical interaction reveal, Study/Investigation reveal, and discerned-state behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusion data for creation, movement, reveal rules, and post-reveal transparency.

findings.issue: The trap is nearly invisible and can be discerned with Intelligence (Investigation) against spell save DC, but runtime JSON stores this only in utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add visibility/discernment fields for nearly invisible traps and Investigation checks.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detection data for nearly invisible trap and Intelligence (Investigation) discernment.

findings.issue: Snare triggers only when a Small, Medium, or Large creature moves onto the ground or floor in the radius. Runtime now filters sizes and records the no-restrained cleanup ending, but the ground/floor movement trigger is not fully first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trap trigger fields for eligible sizes and movement onto the ground/floor area.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trapTrigger data for movement onto the circle's ground/floor surface.

findings.issue: Snare restrains and hoists the creature upside down 3 feet above the ground/floor; Restrained is represented, but the hoisted position and upside-down state are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add positional restraint fields for hoisted height and inverted hanging state.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restraintPosition data for hanging upside down 3 feet above the surface.

findings.issue: Snare transforms consumed rope into a nearly invisible magic trap circle, but that world-state change is not represented beyond utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trap creation/world-state fields for consumed rope disappearing and trap circle becoming magical.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trapCreation data for rope disappearance and magic trap circle.

findings.issue: Thunderwave pushes failed-save creatures and unsecured objects 10 feet away, but runtime JSON keeps both pushes in a generic utility description instead of MOVEMENT/object movement data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add failed-save forced movement fields for creatures and unsecured object push fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime MOVEMENT effect for failed-save creature push and objectMovement data for unsecured objects entirely within the cube.

findings.issue: Some servant tasks can alter the world state, such as cleaning, mending, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring drinks, but task effects are not enumerated.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add task capability fields that can describe simple world-state interactions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime taskCapabilities/worldInteraction data.

findings.issue: Beast Sense's canonical shared perception and special-senses benefit are now reflected in runtime description, but there is still no first-class shared-senses mechanic.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add shared-senses fields for perceive-through-target, retain-own-senses, special-sense inheritance, willing Beast target, and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sharedSenses data instead of relying on a sensory utility description.

findings.issue: Find Traps detects objects/mechanisms and spells such as Alarm or Glyph of Warding that were created to cause damage or danger, but trap eligibility is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trap detection fields for qualifying created danger sources, included spell traps, mechanical traps, and excluded natural hazards.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trapDetection data for qualifying trap categories and exclusions.

findings.issue: Flame Blade's melee spell attack and 3d6 plus spellcasting ability modifier damage are represented in prose/damage dice, but the spellcasting ability modifier addition is not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damage formula fields for spellcasting ability modifier additions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime damage.abilityModifier or formula data for 3d6 plus spellcasting ability modifier.

findings.issue: The sphere must be created in an unoccupied space on the ground, and flammable objects must be not worn or carried to ignite; those placement/eligibility constraints are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add unoccupied ground placement and object not-worn-or-carried ignition eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placement.requiresUnoccupied, placement.surface ground, and ignition object eligibility data.

findings.issue: The Constitution save applies only to unwilling creatures, but runtime save data does not encode that target-state condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-applies-to fields for unwilling creature targets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveAppliesTo unwilling_creature while objects and willing creatures are unaffected by the save.

findings.issue: Magic Weapon gives a +1/+2/+3 bonus to weapon attack and damage rolls by slot tier, but runtime stores the attack/damage bonus as prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add weapon attack/damage bonus fields with tiered slot scaling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime weaponEnhancement data for magic weapon state and attack/damage bonus: +1 base, +2 at slot 3-5, +3 at slot 6+.

findings.issue: The location tracking works only while caster and target are on the same plane of existence, but same-plane gating is not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar prerequisite fields for ongoing detection/knowledge effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime samePlaneRequired true for the location-tracking rider.

findings.issue: On a failed save, the caster always knows the target's location until the spell ends, subject to same-plane gating; runtime has a utility rider but lacks typed tracking payload and visibility overrides.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add location tracking knowledge fields for failed-save riders, duration, target identity, and same-plane requirement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime tracking data for alwaysKnowLocation plus samePlaneRequired and hidden/invisible overrides.

findings.issue: Mind Spike does not apply a named condition, but it creates a caster-specific state where hidden/invisible benefits are suppressed against the caster.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime casterSpecificState data for noHiddenFromCaster and invisibleNoBenefitAgainstCaster.

findings.issue: Misty Step requires the destination to be an unoccupied space the caster can see, but runtime movement lacks destination occupancy and visibility fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination fields for unoccupied and visible requirements.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleportDestination requiresUnoccupied true and requiresSight true.

findings.issue: Moonbeam damage/save data is present and height was corrected, but shape-shifted creatures revert and cannot shape-shift until leaving the Cylinder on a failed save; that failed-save rider is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add failed-save rider fields for shape-shift reversion and cannot-shape-shift-until-leaves-area.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime shapeShiftRider data tied to failed Constitution save.

findings.issue: The target has Advantage on saving throws to avoid or end the Poisoned condition, but this save advantage is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add saving throw modifier fields scoped to avoiding/ending a named condition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveAdvantage data for Poisoned avoidance/end saves.

findings.issue: See Invisibility lets the caster see Invisible creatures and objects as visible and see into the Ethereal Plane; both sensory permissions are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensory override fields for seeing Invisible targets and planar sight into the Ethereal Plane.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensoryOverride data for Invisible visibility and Ethereal Plane sight.

findings.issue: Shatter also damages nonmagical objects that are not worn or carried in the area; validTargets now includes objects, but nonmagical/unattended object eligibility is not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object eligibility fields for nonmagical and not-worn-or-carried area objects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectEligibility data for nonmagical unattended objects in the area.

findings.issue: The target can't benefit from the Invisible condition, but runtime JSON has no field for suppressing benefits from a condition without removing it.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionBenefitSuppression data for Invisible while the spell lasts.

findings.issue: Skywrite's strong-wind early ending is now typed under conditionalEndings, but the spell still creates persistent cloud words in the sky and that environmental/message object remains prose-only.

findings.issue: Damage triggers when a creature moves into or within the area and is calculated for every 5 feet traveled, but runtime only states this in the terrain description.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainDamageTrigger data for 2d4 Piercing per 5 feet traveled.

findings.issue: The target must pursue a reasonable, achievable, non-obviously-harmful suggestion to the best of its ability; runtime stores this social-control rule in prose only.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime socialControl data while preserving ai_dm arbitration for open-ended command judgment.

findings.issue: The Dexterity save and Restrained effect are represented, but the trigger is incomplete because it must fire the first time a creature enters on a turn or starts its turn there.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain structure data for obscurity, anchoring, collapse, and depth.

findings.issue: The webs are flammable; exposed 5-foot cubes burn away in 1 round and deal fire damage to creatures starting in that fire. Damage is represented, but burn-away state is not.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime flammableStructure data for burning web cubes.

findings.issue: The Charisma save is represented and its frequency was corrected to every_time, but runtime still cannot express the combined first-enter-on-a-turn or starts-turn-there trigger.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime trigger composition for Zone of Truth's save timing.

findings.issue: Counterspell requires a Constitution save by the target caster, and a failed save dissipates the spell with no effect; runtime stores this as prose-only utility with condition always.

findings.issue: The spell creates objects from raw materials with Large/Medium size caps, cube containment rules, material-specific constraints, creature/magic-item exclusions, and tool proficiency gates; runtime does not type any of this creation logic.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectCreation/fabrication data.

findings.issue: The caster can repeat the vine's melee spell attack as a Bonus Action on later turns against a creature within 30 feet of the vine; runtime has the initial attack but no granted repeat-attack action.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdGuardian or auraHazard data for placement, enemy filtering, invulnerability, occupied space, and 60-damage depletion.

findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion/disbelief fields for affected senses, unchanged senses, examination action, check ability/skill/DC, and success perception.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusion/disbelief data; keep utilityType sensory only as a temporary enum-compatible value until illusion is supported.

findings.issue: The recalled chest appears in an unoccupied space on the ground within 5 feet of the caster; runtime preserves this only in prose.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectPlacement or recallPlacement data.

findings.issue: The hound is created in an unoccupied visible space, bites one enemy within 5 feet, and barks when a Small-or-larger creature comes within 30 feet without speaking the password; runtime lacks typed placement, enemy-only bite target, size filter, proximity trigger, and password exception fields.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sharedSaveRiders for Exhaustion and emitted light.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetLight and invisibleBenefitSuppression data.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status/rider data for Exhaustion level 1 and no Invisible benefit.

findings.issue: The Dexterity save, half initial damage, initial 10d4 Acid damage, delayed 5d4 Acid damage, and +2d4 scaling are represented, but runtime cannot type that the delayed end-of-next-turn damage applies only to creatures that failed the initial save.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime linkedSaveOutcomeRider data; current second DAMAGE effect preserves the dependency only in description.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveSuccessDamageOverride data; current JSON preserves this rider only in the spell description.

findings.issue: The fog is Heavily Obscured and recurring damage is typed, but runtime lacks created-cloud movement fields for moving 10 feet away from the caster at the start of each caster turn and lacks a strong-wind dispersal ending condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created cloud/hazard movement fields and environmental dispersal ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cloudMovement and dispersalCondition data.

findings.issue: The Large intangible spirit appears in an unoccupied space within range; runtime targets a point but lacks unoccupied-space placement, Large size, and intangible entity fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity placement fields for unoccupied space, size, and physicality.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spiritPlacement and spiritPhysicality data.

findings.issue: The spell creates a vegetable or mineral object up to a 5-foot cube, with material-dependent duration, shortest duration for mixed materials, material-component failure if reused in other spells, and +5 feet cube scaling; runtime stores this only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object creation fields for material classes, size cap, material duration table, mixed-material shortest duration, material-component failure, and slot scaling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectCreation data.

findings.issue: The teleport destination must be an unoccupied visible space up to 60 feet away; runtime now has teleport movement but lacks unoccupied visible destination fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination eligibility fields for visible and unoccupied space.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleportDestination filter data.

findings.issue: Using the devil's true name grants advantage on contested command checks; runtime lacks contested-check and conditional advantage fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add contested command-check fields with conditional advantage sources.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime commandCheck data.

findings.issue: Invisible, Blinded, and Deafened states are prose-only in runtime, including the condition that invisibility ends on attacking or casting a spell.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status fields and conditional ending fields for Mislead.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Invisible/Blinded/Deafened status data plus invisibility ending triggers.

findings.issue: The invisible sensor and its luminous-orb appearance to creatures that see invisible objects are state changes not represented as data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensor visibility-state fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensorVisibility data.

findings.issue: Runtime now has teleport movement, but the destination must be an unoccupied visible space within 5 feet of a hit-or-missed target; that secondary destination filter is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleport destination fields for unoccupied visible space near any attacked target.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleportDestination data.

findings.issue: Safe shunting to an unoccupied surface space is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add shunt destination eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime shuntDestination data.

findings.issue: Difficult Terrain is represented, but Three-Quarters Cover is only preserved in utility prose and the terrain effect uses a validator-safe Square workaround because terrain effects do not accept Wall shapes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add typed cover fields and align terrain area shapes with wall-shaped areas.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cover data and extend terrain effect area support for Wall shapes.

findings.issue: The created blade wall is now marked as a creation utility, but cover/barrier properties are still not first-class runtime fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-wall cover and barrier property fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime bladeWallStructureProperties data.

findings.issue: The spoken password grants immunity, and grove guardians obey spoken commands while in the area; runtime lacks password immunity and command surfaces.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add password immunity and spoken guardian command fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime druidGroveCommunication data.

findings.issue: Area can be one 50-foot square, one hundred contiguous 5-foot squares, or twenty-five contiguous 10-foot squares up to 20 feet tall; runtime only has a coarse 2,500-square-foot area.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward shape partition and height fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wardAreaPartition data.

findings.issue: Moving the Cylinder when the caster moves and applying effects when creatures enter/end turn/move into it are represented, but runtime lacks first-class moving area and once-per-turn affected tracking.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving area and once-per-turn affected fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movingArea and oncePerTurnEffectLimit data.

findings.issue: The zombie creation is a death-triggered rider, not a ward/alarm, and runtime currently approximates it with after_primary because the trigger enum cannot express 'target killed by this spell at start of your next turn'.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-triggered rider timing fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetDeathTrigger with delayed start-of-next-turn timing.

findings.issue: Flammable objects that are not worn or carried start burning; valid targets now include objects and utility/terrain effects preserve the rule, but runtime lacks object flammability and worn/carried exclusion filters.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object flammability plus worn/carried exclusion fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectIgnitionFilter data.

findings.issue: The spell can make terrain physically impede movement and remove illusory pieces when taken away; runtime lacks first-class terrain-state and removed-piece dissipation fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add physical illusion environmental state fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime physicalIllusionTerrain data.

findings.issue: Nearly imperceptible glyph and triggered Dim Light are preserved, but runtime lacks first-class detectability DC and triggered light duration fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detectability and triggered light fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detectability and triggeredLight data.

findings.issue: Medium-or-smaller unsecured unworn/un-carried object suction and Large-or-smaller creature restraint are preserved in utility/effects, but runtime lacks typed object security/worn-carried and size-gated rider fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object security/worn-carried and size-gated rider fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectSuctionFilter and sizeGatedRider data.

groups.title: Duration Progression Or Permanence
groups.closureRule: Repeated casting, full-duration concentration, elapsed days, or slot level changes duration, permanence, or concentration requirements.

findings.issue: Find Familiar uses a Bonus Action for shared senses, Magic actions for dismiss/reappear, and recasting changes the familiar's form.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add follow-up action fields for shared senses, temporary dismissal, reappearance, permanent dismissal, and recast reshaping.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed one narrow mismatch by changing sharedSensesCost to bonus_action; add runtime follow-up action data for dismiss/reappear/recast behavior.

findings.issue: If the Beast does not reach the destination before the spell ends, the message is lost and the Beast returns to the casting location; duration also scales by slot.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delivery failure and duration scaling fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deliveryFailure data and durationScaling +48 hours per slot above 2.

findings.issue: The aura/mask illusion changes how spells and magical effects treat or detect the target, and repeated daily casting for 30 days makes it last until dispelled; runtime stores only prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add magical-detection illusion fields and repeated-cast permanence fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime magicAuraIllusion data plus permanenceProgression dailyFor30Days -> until_dispelled.

findings.issue: Galder's Tower has recast maintenance and a same-location/same-configuration permanence rule that are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recastMaintenance and permanenceCondition fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime persistence data for +24 hour recasts and daily same-location/same-configuration one-year permanence.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon/controlled-entity bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Wards, glyph triggers, and delayed triggered effects need trigger-condition and stored-effect fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/trigger bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Some ending conditions are represented in prose/options but need reusable break-condition fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing duration/utility/status break fields as interim data.

findings.issue: The spell-glyph stored spell constraints are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add storedSpell fields for max spell level, prepared requirement, cast-as-part cost, target constraints, and concentration override.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime storedSpell constraints for level <= slot, prepared, single-creature/area target, and concentration full-duration handling.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Environmental changes need reusable world-state fields for weather, obscurement, growth, gas, liquids, and hazards.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environment/world-state bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/damage/utility fields as interim data.

findings.issue: Enrichment changes future harvest output, but that created-resource/world-state effect is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add harvestYieldMultiplier fields for plant enrichment.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime enrichment data yieldMultiplier 2 for 365 days.

findings.issue: Plant Growth modifies food resources and imposes a one-Plant-Growth-per-year limit.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resourceYield and annualBenefitLimit fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantYield data with multiplier 2 and benefitCooldown 365 days.

findings.issue: Plant Growth has two environmental world-state effects: overgrowth movement cost and long-term enrichment, both prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add overgrowth movement cost and enrichment duration/radius fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange data for overgrowth movementCostMultiplier 4 and enrichment radius half-mile for 365 days.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Communication rules need sender/recipient, language, plane, and message-shape fields.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Summoned/controlled entities need command, initiative, stat, duration, and ownership fields.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing SUMMONING/Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Wards, glyph triggers, and delayed triggered effects need trigger-condition and stored-effect fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward/trigger bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: The spell exposes one-day local event history through plants and can alter plant terrain, but both are prose-only.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantKnowledge data for last 1 day creatures/weather/circumstances and terrain conversion data.

findings.issue: The caster asks one question about a goal, event, or activity within 7 days; the DM gives a truthful phrase or cryptic rhyme; repeated castings before a Long Rest have cumulative 25 percent no-answer chance. Runtime stores this as prose only.

findings.issue: The spirit's form, Celestial/Fey/Fiend type, and language are all caster choices; runtime stores none of them as typed options.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon choice data.

findings.issue: The mount can be dismissed temporarily as an action, released permanently as an action, and recast to re-summon the bonded mount with restored HP and removed conditions; runtime lacks these lifecycle actions.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime bondedSummon lifecycle data.

findings.issue: The mount gains a language if needed and has 1-mile telepathy with the caster; runtime lacks typed language and telepathy fields.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon communication data.

findings.issue: The spell creates a bonded controllable mount with form options, stat-block references, type overrides, combat control, telepathy, spell-sharing, disappearance/recast lifecycle, one-mount bond limit, and carried-object drop behavior; runtime is only a generic utility placeholder.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bonded mount summon fields covering form, stats, control, spell sharing, lifecycle, bond limit, and equipment handling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime bondedMount summon data.

findings.issue: The one-bond limit across Find Greater Steed and Find Steed is a persistent relationship constraint, not currently typed.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime bondLimit data.

findings.issue: The chest and contents move to the Ethereal Plane, can be recalled to the caster, can be sent back, and may remain findable there if the spell ends; runtime stores this planar object movement only in prose.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarObjectStorage data.

findings.issue: The spell has a cumulative 5 percent daily ending chance after 60 days, ends if cast again, and ends if the Tiny replica is destroyed; runtime preserves these only in prose.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for the 60-day cumulative chance, recast ending, and replica destruction.

findings.issue: At the end of each of the demon's turns it makes a Charisma save, with disadvantage if the caster says its true name; on success, control ends. Runtime has no typed recurring control save or true-name save modifier.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonControlSave data for the demon's end-turn Charisma save and true-name disadvantage.

findings.issue: When summoned and on each later caster turn, the caster can issue a verbal command requiring no action; runtime lacks command-economy fields for controlled summons.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summonCommand data.

findings.issue: The spell summons a demon with type choice, own initiative, no-action commands, default hostile behavior, recurring control saves, uncontrolled behavior, protective-circle interaction, 0-HP disappearance, and post-concentration linger; runtime is still a generic utility placeholder.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add full controlled-summon fields for entity choice, initiative, allegiance/control state, command economy, default behavior, control saves, uncontrolled behavior, protective circle, and disappearance rules.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime SUMMONING or summonEntity data for Summon Greater Demon.

findings.issue: The demon's stat block is selected by demon type and it disappears at 0 Hit Points, but runtime lacks typed summoned stat-block reference, HP state, and disappearance-on-0-HP semantics.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon.statBlock and disappearance data.

findings.issue: Control can end on a successful Charisma save while the summoned demon remains, and an uncontrolled demon can linger for 1d6 rounds after concentration ends if it still has Hit Points; runtime lacks these ending branches.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon control-ending and post-concentration linger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlEnding and uncontrolledLinger data.

findings.issue: The target gains the ability to speak one language the caster knows; runtime preserves this only in utility prose.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime languageGrant data.

findings.issue: The target gains Intelligence 10, language, Charmed for 30 days, and later chooses its attitude; Charmed is now typed, but intelligence, language, attitude, and break-on-damage remain prose-only.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime intelligenceChange, languageGrant, breakOnDamage, and postCharmAttitude data.

findings.issue: Charmed is now typed for 30 days, but the early ending when the caster or allies deal damage and the attitude choice after the condition ends are not first-class.

findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime statusCondition.breakOnDamageFrom and postConditionChoice data.

findings.issue: The spell can end on the target after three repeat-save successes, last 7 days after three failures, and resist later Poisoned-ending effects unless another Constitution save succeeds; runtime lacks those ending branches.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object Creation and broad reality reshaping can create entities or world changes beyond current creation/summon schemas.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add broad wish adjudication/creation bucket with object/entity/world-state branches.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records options and uses aiContext for adjudication.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Instant Health full HP is represented, but Greater Restoration effect removal needs a condition/restoration effect schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration/removal bucket for Greater Restoration-listed effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON includes HEALING all_hit_points and Instant Health Utility Option.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Strength becomes 3 for 2d4 days and feat replacement need ability-score/feature-change schemas.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary ability score set and feature replacement buckets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records Strength reduction and Sudden Learning in Utility Options.

groups.title: End Cleanup: Fall, Descent, Or Prone Outcome
groups.closureRule: A spell or effect ending causes falling, controlled descent, landing prone, or another end-position consequence.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Sensory prediction/detection effects need a sensor/information schema when they are more than plain description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensor/information bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options as interim runtime representation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Ignition, weather, sensory, or cosmetic environmental change needs a reusable environment/world-state bucket.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environment/world-state fields for ignition, weather, sensory phenomena, and lasting environmental facts.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep current utility/terrain/damage representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Catapult requires choosing an eligible object and a travel direction, then resolving a straight-line movement path; current data collapses this to an area line plus prose utility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object projectile fields for selected object, chosen direction, straight-line travel, maximum distance, fall behavior, and stop-on-impact.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime projectile/objectMovement data rather than generic utility text.

findings.issue: Catapult's Dexterity save is only made by a creature the moving object would strike, and failure causes the object to stop and damage both object and creature; JSON stores a generic immediate save damage effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add projectile-impact save fields tied to collision, object stop behavior, and damage-to-both-target-and-object.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime collision-gated save and impact damage data instead of immediate area damage.

findings.issue: Catapult stops early on impact with a solid surface and then drops the object, but there is no surface collision or fall-state representation.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add projectile collision fields for solid surface impact and fall-to-ground behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime projectile collision/landing data.

findings.issue: Create or Destroy Water has four utility modes with different targets, environmental effects, and scaling choices.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add utility option fields for create contained water, create rain, destroy contained water, and destroy fog, including per-mode target, volume/cube size, exposed-flame extinguishing, and slot-scaling choice.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime utilityOptions data instead of relying on one prose description.

findings.issue: The spell creates clean water, extinguishes exposed flames with rain, destroys contained water, and clears fog, but these world-state changes are not first-class runtime fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental change fields for water creation/destruction, rain extinguishing exposed flames, and fog destruction.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange data for water volume, rain cube, exposed flame extinguishing, and fog removal.

findings.issue: The disk can move across uneven terrain, stairs, and slopes, but cannot cross elevation changes of 10 feet or more; spatial details preserve measurements, but traversal permissions are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object traversal fields for allowed terrain and blocked elevation changes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime traversal data for uneven terrain/stairs/slopes allowed and elevationChangeLimit 10 feet.

findings.issue: The disk follows the caster when the caster moves more than 20 feet away and remains within 20 feet, but follow movement behavior is only summarized in objectDescription and spatial notes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-object follow fields for follow threshold, desired distance, immobile-near-caster rule, and obstacle limitations.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime followBehavior data for the disk.

findings.issue: The caster mentally chooses a creature for the Charmed target to attack each turn, and choosing no creature or having no creature in reach lets the target act normally; this forced-action choice is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add compelled-action control fields for controller-selected attack target, fallback when no valid choice exists, and before-movement timing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime compelledAction data for melee attack before movement against a controller-chosen creature other than itself.

findings.issue: Charmed is represented, but the additional forced-action behavioral state is not modeled as a typed control/status rider.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add control-state fields for forced action, timing, controller choice, and fallback behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlState/compelledAction data linked to the Charmed target.

findings.issue: Find Steed has persistent summon lifecycle, replacement on recast, controlled mount behavior while ridden, independent behavior if caster is Incapacitated, and leave-behind carried gear; runtime summon data is too shallow.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon lifecycle/control fields for replacement, initiative sharing, controlled mount, incapacitated fallback behavior, disappearance causes, and carried-gear handling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime summon lifecycle/control data for the Otherworldly Steed.

findings.issue: Levitate raises and suspends a creature or loose object and later changes altitude by up to 20 feet, but the current movement model has no vertical suspension/altitude-change type and is forced to use teleport.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add vertical levitation/suspension movement fields, altitude delta, actor-specific action cost, and max object weight.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime levitation data for vertical rise 20 feet, suspended duration, altitude adjustment 20 feet, and 500-pound object limit.

findings.issue: The target can move only by pushing or pulling against a fixed object or surface within reach, as if climbing; this movement restriction is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement restriction fields for requires fixed surface/object within reach and climb-like movement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementRestriction data for levitated targets.

findings.issue: Fixed objects or surfaces within reach determine whether a levitated target can self-move, but terrain/surface dependency is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface dependency fields for movement constraints.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceDependency data for fixed object/surface within reach.

findings.issue: The gentle float to the ground after the spell ends is an aftermath behavior rather than ordinary duration text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath behavior fields for movement effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime aftermath data matching the conditional-ending finding.

findings.issue: A dangerous phantasm can deal 2d8 Psychic damage on each of the caster's turns only if the target is in the phantasm's area or within 5 feet, but runtime lacks actor timing and distance/area gating.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring illusion damage fields for caster-turn timing and target-in-area-or-within-distance condition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime phantasmDamage data with timing caster_turn, dice 2d8, targetGate inAreaOrWithin5Feet.

findings.issue: Phantasmal Force creates a target-only mental illusion, lets the target Study it with Intelligence (Investigation) vs spell save DC, causes rationalization, and can end on successful study; these mechanics are mostly prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add phantasm fields for target-only perception, Study action reveal check, rationalization behavior, and end-on-successful-study.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime phantasm data with studyEscape and rationalization.

findings.issue: The phantasm can appear as an object, creature, bridge, or other phenomenon but is target-only and mental rather than a physical object; this representational object is not modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mental illusion representation fields without physical object stats.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime phantasmRepresentation data.

findings.issue: The target rationalizes illogical outcomes from interacting with the phantasm, a cognition/knowledge effect not represented structurally.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add cognition/rationalization fields for mental illusions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime rationalizesContradictions true.

findings.issue: Unconscious is now represented, but gaining a short rest after the full duration and immunity to Catnap until a long rest are still prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add rest-benefit and temporary recast-immunity fields tied to completing the full duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restBenefit and affectedBySpellLockout data.

findings.issue: Fly grants a Fly Speed of 60 feet and hover, but runtime stores this only in utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement grant fields for fly speed and hover.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementGrant data for flySpeed 60 and hover true.

findings.issue: Glyph of Warding's configurable trigger and exclusion rules are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wardTrigger fields for trigger events, distance, creature filters, password, and custom prose fallback.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wardTrigger data and stop treating the payload as immediate.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Some state changes are not simple D&D conditions and need state-change fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add state-change bucket fields for non-condition states.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use STATUS_CONDITION where possible and Utility Options elsewhere.

findings.issue: Targets can move across any liquid surface as harmless solid ground, with lava heat still damaging them, but runtime stores liquid-surface movement only as utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement-surface adaptation fields for liquid-surface walking, surface examples, harmless-ground treatment, and retained heat damage exceptions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceMovement data for liquid surfaces and damage exceptions.

findings.issue: The caster can issue no-action commands that the target obeys on its turn, including attack, movement, and object fetching, with fallback self-protection behavior; runtime only has Charmed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dominated-target command fields for no-action commands, obedience, examples, idle behavior, and reaction command cost.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledTarget command data.

findings.issue: Charmed is typed, but the status carries special domination riders: command obedience, same-plane telepathic link, self-protection fallback, and on-damage repeat save.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status rider fields for domination-specific control behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status rider data for domination.

findings.issue: Creatures can be ejected to chosen nearby spaces, overflow creatures fall out and land prone within 5 feet, restrained creatures move with the sphere, and spell-end fall knocks restrained creatures prone; runtime lacks forced placement and prone ejection data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add forced placement/ejection fields for success ejection, overflow ejection, carried movement, and spell-end prone placement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime forcedPlacement and ejectionProne data.

findings.issue: The sphere's hover height, safe descent over pits or cliffs, spell-end fall to ground, and flame extinguishing are terrain/environment interactions stored only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain interaction fields for hover height, drop-off descent, fall-to-ground, and normal-flame extinguishing radius.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainInteraction data.

findings.issue: The spell creates a movable 5-foot-radius sphere of water with capacity, hover, engulfing, movement, fall, extinguishing, and vanish rules; runtime only models Restrained.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created movable area/object fields for sphere identity, capacity, movement, occupant handling, and disappearance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdSphere data.

findings.issue: Restrained is typed with the corrected repeat save, but engulfed state, Prone on overflow/spell-end, size capacity, and carried-with-sphere riders are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status rider fields for engulfed, prone aftermath, size capacity, carried movement, and ejection behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status riders and secondary Prone effects.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the sphere extinguishes all normal flames within 30 feet, and the created water then vanishes; runtime lacks typed flame-extinguishing and vanish cleanup fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental cleanup fields for normal-flame extinguishing radius and created-water disappearance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime extinguishFlames and vanishOnEnd data.

findings.issue: After the spell ends, restrained creatures are left prone where the sphere falls and normal flames within 30 feet have been extinguished; runtime lacks typed post-end state outcomes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath fields for spell-end prone placement and extinguished normal flames.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellEndAftermath data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses Gusts, Downdraft, or Updraft, can later switch/halt/restart with an action, and Gusts also chooses calm/moderate/strong intensity and direction; runtime lacks typed wind mode controls.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental mode fields with action-based switch, halt, restart, direction, and intensity choices.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime windControlModes data.

findings.issue: Moderate/strong Gusts and Downdraft impose disadvantage on ranged weapon attacks through or inside the cube, and Downdraft forces Strength saves on flying creatures; runtime lacks these attack modifier and flying-save fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area attack-roll modifier fields and flying-only save trigger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime windAttackDisadvantage and downdraftFlyingSave data.

findings.issue: The spell controls air in a 100-foot cube with Gusts, Downdraft, and Updraft modes affecting ranged attacks, movement cost, falling damage, vertical jumps, and flying creatures; runtime is still generic utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled-air environmental fields for wind modes, intensity, direction, movement cost, fall damage reduction, jump bonus, and flying-creature interactions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledWindArea data.

findings.issue: Dismissal can send a qualifying creature back to its home plane, or Undead to the Shadowfell and Fey to the Feywild if not on their home plane; runtime lacks typed planar return/destination fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar dismissal fields for qualifying creature types, home-plane return, and type-specific fallback destinations.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarDismissal data.

findings.issue: The Charmed target obeys no-action commands on its turn, has fallback self-protection behavior, can be commanded to use a Reaction at caster reaction cost, and repeats saves on damage; runtime lacks dominated-target control fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dominated-target control fields distinct from summon fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dominationControl data.

findings.issue: Creature/object modes, same-or-new target choice, and repeated Magic action use remain prose-only beyond the basic Restrained state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telekinesis mode and target-switch fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime telekinesisModes data.

findings.issue: Runtime has the creature Strength save and Restrained state, but object modes, worn/carried object save, and automatic unattended object movement remain under-modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add separate creature, unattended object, and worn/carried object save branches.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime telekinesisBranch data.

findings.issue: The 30-foot creature/object movement and pulling worn/carried objects away are not represented as movement effects.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telekinetic forced movement fields for creatures and objects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime telekineticMovement data.

findings.issue: Restrained duration is corrected, but suspended-in-air state and fall unless reapplied remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add suspension/fall state fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime telekineticSuspension data.

findings.issue: Switching targets ends the previous target's effect and a lifted creature falls unless reapplied; runtime lacks these ending conditions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target-switch and reapply-or-fall ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime telekinesisEnding data.

findings.issue: Strength saves for mud restraint, Dexterity saves for falling mud damage, and Dexterity saves for mud-to-rock shunting/restraint are not all represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-mode save branches.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transmuteRockSaveBranches data.

findings.issue: Sinking into mud and shunting to the surface are not represented as movement/position outcomes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sink and shunt movement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transmuteRockMovement data.

findings.issue: Mud difficult movement cost, rock/mud surface transformation, ceiling mud fall, and mud depth limits are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain transformation fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transmuteRockTerrain data.

findings.issue: Restrained by mud/rock, action escape, DC 20 Strength check, and damage-to-break options are not fully represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restraint and escape/break fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transmuteRockRestraint data.

findings.issue: The area changes between rock and mud and can create falling mud; runtime lacks environment transformation data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental transmutation fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transmuteRockEnvironment data.

findings.issue: Runtime now has a teleport surface, but destination spot choice within 5 feet and no-movement fallback remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add tree-stride destination choice fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime treeStrideDestination data.

findings.issue: The post-duration permanent wall, non-dispellable state, disappearance fallback, and possible panel-collapse aftermath are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structure aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallAftermath data.

findings.issue: The spell has grass/undergrowth, tree, root/vine, and rock submodes with separate target and timing rules; runtime only stores partial damage/status effects.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental submode fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wrathOfNatureModes data.

findings.issue: Tree and root saves have been corrected, but the bonus-action rock ranged spell attack, 3d8 bludgeoning damage, and follow-up Strength save against prone remain under-modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-submode attack/save branches.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime rockAttackBranch and treeSaveBranch data.

findings.issue: The caster can use a bonus action each turn to launch a loose rock; runtime lacks the granted bonus action and its target restrictions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained bonus-action branch fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add grantedActions entry for the rock launch action.

findings.issue: Grass or undergrowth in the cube becomes difficult terrain for enemies, but runtime lacks enemy-only difficult terrain tied to those surfaces.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add enemy-only terrain modification fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime enemyDifficultTerrain data.

findings.issue: The spell animates trees, rocks, grasses, and undergrowth as hostile environmental actors, but runtime does not model animated terrain/entities as controlled sources.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add animated-environment source fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime animatedEnvironmentSources data.

findings.issue: Restrained and Prone are partially represented after save corrections, but root target choice, spell-save-DC Athletics escape, and the rock branch's prone follow-up still need first-class data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add submode-linked status and escape fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime rootRestraint and rockProneBranch data.

findings.issue: The target can choose to fail the lift save, and a restrained creature can choose Strength or Dexterity for escape; runtime lacks voluntary save failure and escape-ability choice fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add voluntary save-failure and escape-check choice fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarSaveChoice and pillarEscapeChoice data.

findings.issue: The lift save, optional failure, ceiling/obstacle damage branch, and escape check are all distinct branches but runtime only has one generic damage save.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add pillar lift, crush, and escape save/check branches.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarBranch data.

findings.issue: Pillar count, dimensions, and rubble measurements are represented, but ground width eligibility, Medium-or-smaller creature targeting, rubble difficult terrain lifecycle, and clearing requirements are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add pillar placement and rubble terrain lifecycle fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarPlacement and rubbleTerrain data.

findings.issue: Restrained-by-obstacle, Strength-or-Dexterity action escape, and move-or-fall outcome after escape are not represented as status and movement outcomes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add obstacle restraint, escape choice, and post-escape outcome fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarRestraint data.

findings.issue: Stone pillars bursting from the ground, obstacle-limited height, and rubble difficult terrain after destruction are not fully represented as environmental state changes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add pillar creation, obstacle interaction, and rubble state fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarEnvironmentChange data.

findings.issue: The caster's 60-foot flying speed is represented as MOVEMENT speed_change and utility prose, but runtime lacks a first-class movement-mode field distinguishing flying speed from generic speed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement mode fields for walking/flying/swimming/climbing/burrowing speed grants.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementModeSpeed data.

findings.issue: The Large-or-smaller failed-save push is represented as MOVEMENT push, but runtime lacks a first-class 'away from center of area' direction; caster_choice is a schema-safe placeholder.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add forced-movement origin/direction fields including away_from_area_center.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime forcedMovement.origin=center_of_area and direction=away_from_origin.

findings.issue: The possession save and host-death self-save are present in structured prose/options, but runtime lacks a possession attempt effect and self-save consequence model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add possession attempt/save fields and self-save aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime possessionAttempt and hostDeathSelfSave data.

findings.issue: The caster cannot take Reactions while in the container; runtime records this in MOVEMENT description but lacks a first-class reaction suppression field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add action/reaction restriction fields with allowed action exceptions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime actionRestrictions data.

findings.issue: Protection from Evil and Good and Magic Circle prevent possession, but runtime lacks ward-prevention integration.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add blocked-by-spell/effect fields for possession and similar mechanics.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime blockedBySpellEffects data.

findings.issue: Soul return, caster death, host death, body distance, body dead, and container destruction outcomes are too specific for current duration fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending and soul-return outcome fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime magicJarEndConditions data.

findings.issue: Fly Speed 300 feet, hover, reverting forms, safe descent, and later fall are represented, but runtime lacks first-class movement mode, hover, transformation timing, and descent/fall aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement mode, hover, transformation duration, safe descent, and fall aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementModeSpeed, hover, transformationState, and onEndDescent data.

findings.issue: Reverting to cloud form and the end-of-effect safe descent/fall sequence are represented as utility options but need first-class transformation and on-end movement consequence fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformation state and on-spell-end descent/fall fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformationState and onSpellEndMovementConsequence data.

findings.issue: Anchored objects, reachable fixed objects, and ceilings affect the upward fall; runtime preserves this in utility options but lacks first-class anchored/fixed-object collision and grab-surface fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add anchored/fixed-object interaction fields for gravity and fall effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime anchoredObjectInteraction and grabSurfaceEligibility data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: The hit point threshold death branch needs a threshold/instant-death schema; current DAMAGE can only preserve the high-HP damage branch.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a threshold outcome bucket for hit-point-threshold instant death versus fallback damage.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records 12d12 Psychic damage and Death threshold Utility Option.

groups.title: Delivery Failure, Cooldown, Or Availability
groups.closureRule: A spell can fail delivery, create a later casting block, enforce a cooldown, or depend on target/soul availability.

findings.issue: Message is blocked by magical silence and by specific barrier materials/thicknesses, which are not represented structurally.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication blocker fields for silence and material barriers.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication blocker data for silence, one foot of stone/metal/wood, and thin lead.

findings.issue: The spell's detected creature types, Hallow detection, location payload, and blocker materials are not represented as first-class detection fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detection fields for detected creature types, detected spell/effect names, location payload, radius, and blocker materials.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detection data for creature-type and Hallow sensing instead of prose-only utility.

findings.issue: Detect Magic's faint aura visibility requires a later Magic action and only applies to visible creatures or objects bearing magic; runtime stores this in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detection reveal fields for follow-up Magic action, visible target requirement, aura visibility, and blocker materials.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime grantedAction/detectionReveal data plus blocker material data.

findings.issue: The spell detects several poison/disease categories and their locations, but the categories and location payload are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detection fields for poisons, poisonous/venomous creatures, magical contagions, location payload, radius, and blocker materials.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detection data for poison, poisonous/venomous creature, and magical contagion sensing.

findings.issue: Dissonant Whispers represents reaction-using forced movement away from the caster, but 'if available' and 'safest route' are only stored in prose/custom formula.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reaction availability and safest-route forced movement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime forcedMovement routeConstraint=safest_route and reactionRequiredIfAvailable data.

findings.issue: Arcane Lock magically locks a closed door/window/gate/container/hatch, blocks nonmagical unlocking, permits designated creatures, and optionally uses a spoken password within 5 feet to unlock for 1 minute. Runtime prose has been updated, but lock behavior is not first-class data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add lock control fields for eligible object types, nonmagical-unlock prevention, designated opener list, password, password range, and temporary unlock duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lockControl data instead of relying on utility description.

findings.issue: The specific Darkvision cannot see through it rule is only described, not represented as a sense-specific blocker.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sense-blocker fields for named senses or perception modes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime senseBlocker data for Darkvision.

findings.issue: Detect Thoughts has Sense Thoughts and Read Thoughts modes, and later turns can activate either mode with a Magic action; runtime stores two utility effects but no explicit mode/action selection model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repeatable mode activation fields for later-turn Magic action choices.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime utilityModes for Sense Thoughts and Read Thoughts with later-turn Magic action activation.

findings.issue: The deeper probe Wisdom save has different outcomes: failed save reveals deeper information, successful save ends the spell. Runtime has a save but lacks a typed success-ending outcome tied to the probe.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save outcome fields for success_ends_spell and failed-save knowledge payloads.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime probeSave data with Wisdom save, fail reveals reasoning/emotions/looming concern, success ends spell.

findings.issue: The spell's targets must know languages or be telepathic for thought sensing/reading to work, but language/telepathy eligibility is not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mental communication/thought eligibility fields for knows-language or telepathic.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime thoughtEligibility data requiring languagesKnown or telepathy.

findings.issue: Detect Thoughts can end on successful Wisdom save against deeper probe or on a target's action Intelligence (Arcana) check while attention remains shifted; only prose carries the Arcana escape and attention condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending and escape-check fields for successful probe save, target Arcana action, and shift-attention-away condition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime endConditions for successful probe save and target action Intelligence (Arcana) check against spell save DC.

findings.issue: Locate Object can locate a familiar specific object or nearest object of a kind, gives direction to location and movement direction if moving, and is blocked by any lead; runtime keeps this as prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object detection query fields for specific familiar object, kind/category search, 1000-foot radius, direction payload, movement direction payload, and lead blocker.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime detectionQuery data for object search modes, output payloads, and lead-blocked direct path.

findings.issue: The 2d8 healing and +1d8 scaling are represented, but Short Rest benefits and once-per-creature-until-Long-Rest lockout are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration fields for grants_short_rest_benefits and per-target lockout until Long Rest.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restBenefit short_rest and perCreatureCooldown until_long_rest.

findings.issue: Rope Trick creates an Invisible portal and gives creatures inside one-way sight through it while blocking attacks, spells, and effects.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add portal visibility and one-way perception fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime portal data for Invisible entrance, 3-by-5-foot aperture, one-way sight, and effect barrier.

findings.issue: The spell opens an Invisible portal to an extradimensional space reached by climbing the rope, with capacity and effect-barrier rules.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add extradimensional portal fields for access method, portal size, capacity, occupant size limit, and pass-through restrictions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime extradimensionalSpace data for access, capacity, and attacks/spells/effects blocked across the portal.

findings.issue: The extradimensional portal has an explicit pass-through blocker for attacks, spells, and effects while allowing one-way sight.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add portal pass-through restriction fields for blocked attacks, blocked spells, blocked effects, and allowed sight.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime portalBarrier data instead of relying on the utility description.

findings.issue: Silence blocks sound creation and sound passage through the sphere and makes verbal-component spellcasting impossible there; runtime keeps those as prose in a utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sound-zone fields for no sound created, no sound passing through, and verbal component casting blocked in the area.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime soundSuppression and verbalCastingBlocked data for the sphere.

findings.issue: On a failed save, a creature cannot speak a deliberate lie while in the radius, but runtime stores the speech restriction in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add truth/speech restriction fields for deliberate-lie blocking.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime truthZone data for failed-save lie prevention.

findings.issue: Haste has a delayed spell-end state change that needs a spell-end trigger model before it can be encoded correctly.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spellEndTrigger/afterEffect fields for temporary post-duration statuses and speed overrides.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellEndEffect data for Incapacitated and Speed 0 until the end of the target's next turn.

findings.issue: Tiny Hut creates a passage and spell-effect barrier with an initial occupant/object whitelist.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add barrier fields for initial occupants/objects, barred entrants, blocked spell levels, and blocked spell effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime barrier data for initial allowed creatures/objects, outside barred creatures/objects, and level <=3 spell/effect blocking.

findings.issue: Magic Circle's entry restrictions, teleport/interplanar save, attack disadvantage, and charm/frighten/possess protection are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add creatureType-gated barrier, travel blocking, attack disadvantage, and condition/source protection fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime magicCircleBarrier data for entry/exit mode, Charisma save for teleport/interplanar travel, disadvantage on attacks, and protection from Charmed/Frightened/Possessed by affected creature types.

findings.issue: Meld into Stone hides the caster from nonmagical senses and blocks outside sight, but those sensory states are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add nonmagical undetectability and blocked outside vision fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensoryState data for nonmagical undetectable presence and cannotSeeOutside.

findings.issue: Nondetection blocks Divination targeting and magical scrying sensor perception, but these protections are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add divinationProtection and scryingSensorBlock fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime antiDivination data for cannotBeTargetedByDivination and cannotBePerceivedByMagicalScryingSensors.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.
