findings.issue: Actionable open: Communication rules need sender/recipient, language, plane, and message-shape fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing Utility Options as interim data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Knowledge, attitude, speech, or memory effects need explicit social/knowledge fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social/knowledge bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current status/utility text as interim representation.

findings.issue: Sending creates knowledge states for sender recognition, delivery failure, and blocked status.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication knowledge-result fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgePayload for sender recognition if known, deliveryFailureKnown, and blockedKnown.

findings.issue: Sending has delivery failure and recipient-created block conditions that can cause later casts to fail.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add delivery failure and recipient block/cooldown fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deliveryFailure and recipientBlock duration 8 hours with failure result on blocked recast.

findings.issue: Slow blocks all reactions, but this is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reactionsBlocked field.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime reactionRestriction cannotTakeReactions.

findings.issue: The wall must be on the ground, blocks line of sight but not movement, and costs 3 feet of movement for every 1 foot moved in its space; runtime has wall dimensions but no typed movement-cost multiplier or ground placement rule.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain obstruction fields for ground placement, line-of-sight blocking, movement passability, and movement-cost multiplier.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain/wall obstruction data for 3-for-1 movement cost and line-of-sight blocking.

findings.issue: The wall blocks line of sight, and creatures are Blinded while in its space; runtime has Blinded but does not type the wall's line-of-sight blocking separately.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add opaque/blocks-line-of-sight fields for area hazards and structures.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sightObstruction or wallProperties data for line-of-sight blocking.

findings.issue: The wall rises from the ground, follows one continuous path along the ground, and blocks certain creatures, objects, gases, and projectiles; runtime has spatial notes and utility controlOptions but no typed passability/filter rules.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall passability/filter fields for ground pathing, gas blocking, flying-size blocking, projectile deflection, and unaffected projectile exceptions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallInteraction data instead of relying on controlOptions prose.

findings.issue: Strong wind keeps fog, smoke, and gases at bay and prevents gaseous-form creatures from passing; runtime now preserves this as utility controlOptions but lacks typed gas and form passability fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental barrier fields for gas/smoke/fog blocking and gaseous-form passability.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalBarrier data for gases and gaseous-form creatures.

findings.issue: The eye hovers, moves independently, is blocked by solid barriers, and can pass through 1-inch openings; runtime now has action and measured details but no first-class movable sensor/entity model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensor/entity movement fields for hover, independent movement, barrier blocking, and minimum opening size.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime remoteSensor movement data instead of relying on grantedActions and spatial notes.

findings.issue: The spell has a typed information query: specific familiar creature or nearest creature of a seen-up-close kind, 1,000-foot sensing range, direction to location and movement, different-form failure, and lead-path blocking; runtime stores all of this only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add locate/detection fields for query mode, familiarity prerequisite, sensing range, returned information, blocker materials, and form-change failure.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime locateCreature data.

findings.issue: The spell creates a damage-immune enclosing barrier that blocks physical objects, energy, and spell effects in both directions while allowing breathing; runtime preserves barrier rules only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add barrier/enclosure fields for pass-through blocking, damage immunity, breathing exception, inside/outside damage prevention, and object/creature containment.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime barrierEnclosure data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses a Beast form constrained by CR or target level, and that choice replaces most statistics while preserving alignment, personality, creature type, Hit Points, and Hit Point Dice; runtime keeps this transformation payload only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformation form-choice fields for allowed creature type, CR/level cap, replaced stats, retained stats, and action restrictions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformation data for Beast form selection and retained/replaced statistics.

findings.issue: The target gains Temporary Hit Points equal to the Beast form's Hit Points, and those points vanish at spell end; runtime lacks typed temporary-hit-point data tied to chosen form HP.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary-hit-point formula fields that can reference chosen form statistics.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime temporaryHpFormula = beast_form_hit_points.

findings.issue: The chosen Beast stat block replaces most game statistics while preserving listed identity/HP fields; runtime has no typed stat replacement map.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformation stat replacement/retention fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime statReplacement data.

findings.issue: If caster movement would force an affected creature through the barrier, the spell ends; runtime lacks movement-forced early-ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura early-ending fields tied to caster movement forcing blocked creatures through the barrier.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for forced barrier crossing.

findings.issue: A natural plant that is not a creature becomes a Plant creature with movement, humanlike senses, and DM-chosen statistics; runtime now permits object targets but lacks typed natural-plant transformation fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object-to-creature transformation fields for natural plants, creature type, movement/senses grants, and stat-block choice.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime plantAwakening transformation data.

findings.issue: Darkness, Daylight, and Silence are separate light/sound area modes; runtime has no typed light-blocking, bright-light, darkness-countering, or silence data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area light/sound mode fields with magical-light level interactions and silence ingress/egress rules.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hallowLightSoundModes data.

findings.issue: Extradimensional Interference blocks selected creatures from entering or exiting the area using teleportation or interplanar travel; runtime lacks typed travel-prevention fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area travel-block fields for teleportation and interplanar travel.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime hallowTravelBlock data.

findings.issue: Bright and dim light radii are measured in spatial details, but the light emission and line-of-sight blocking are not represented as utility/runtime light or vision-blocking behavior.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add emitted-light and line-of-sight-blocking fields for created areas.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add utility light data and a typed vision-blocking flag for the wall.

findings.issue: The created wall's pass-through rule, line-of-sight blocking, and shrinking length are not represented as typed structure properties.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structure pass-through, sight-blocking, and mutable-dimension fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallStructureProperties data.

findings.issue: Beam use reduces the wall length by 10 feet whether the attack hits or misses, and the spell ends when the length reaches 0 feet; runtime lacks this ending condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add mutable dimension and zero-length ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallLengthReduction and zeroLengthEnds data.

findings.issue: The portals glow and their mist blocks sight, but runtime only preserves those properties in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add portal visibility and sight-blocking fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime portalVisionProperties data.

findings.issue: Open-side entry teleports creatures or objects out of the other portal as if adjacent, while the nonportal side has no effect; this linked travel rule is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add bidirectional linked portal travel fields with open-side entry restrictions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime linkedPortalTravel data.

findings.issue: The illusory cell, target-only perception, and breach triggers are represented as utility and damage effects, but runtime lacks a first-class illusion enclosure and breach-trigger model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion enclosure and breach-trigger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionCell and illusionBreachTriggers data.

findings.issue: The thorn wall, line-of-sight blocking, straight/circular forms, and slow movement are represented, but TerrainEffect cannot encode Wall/Ring forms directly and uses a schema-safe Square terrain shape.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add first-class wall/ring terrain effect shapes and line-of-sight-blocking terrain fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainWallGeometry and blocksLineOfSight data.

findings.issue: Planar return is represented as MOVEMENT teleport, but runtime lacks first-class plane-of-origin destination and 24-hour return prevention except by Wish.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar return and return-prevention exception fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarReturnBlock data.

findings.issue: The caster-chosen early ending condition is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class arbitrary condition/end trigger authoring fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add custom ending condition fields with range/visibility constraints.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime customEndCondition data.

findings.issue: Remote magical viewing prevention is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks a first-class remote perception block field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote magical viewing block fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime remoteViewingBlock data.

findings.issue: Divination targeting and magic detection blocks are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class divination/magic-detection immunity fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add divination targeting and magic detection block fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime divinationProtection data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Maddening Darkness needs darkness/light-suppression fields for around-corners spread, darkvision blocking, spell-level light limits, and audible contents.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add darkness/light suppression fields with spell-level threshold and sound payload.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime darkness/lightSuppression/sound fields.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Temporary hit points from first-form HP can be marked, but the runtime cannot calculate form-derived THP or model vanish-on-end directly.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a form-derived temporary hit point bucket.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON uses DEFENSIVE temporary_hp and Utility Options.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Replacing the caster statistics while retaining selected traits needs a transformation/stat-replacement schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a transformation bucket for replacement and retained-stat lists.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records replacement/retention in Utility Options only.

groups.title: External Destruction Or Dispel
groups.closureRule: A named external spell, dispel effect, object destruction, movement break, or trigger consumption destroys or ends the created effect.

findings.issue: Illusory Script creates an illusion over writing with designated viewers, alternate meaning/handwriting/language, dispel cleanup, and Truesight bypass rules, but JSON keeps all of that in description text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add written-illusion fields for substrate, designated viewers, normal-view payload, alternate script payload, allowed known language, dispel result, and Truesight bypass.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime writtenIllusion data instead of a generic UTILITY description.

findings.issue: The spell conveys a hidden intended meaning to designated readers and can alter meaning, handwriting, and language for others.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add written message fields for hidden message, altered message, viewer groups, and language restriction.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime writtenCommunication data for hidden and altered text payloads.

findings.issue: Each ammunition piece is destroyed after striking, but per-ammunition destruction is not modeled as object state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-instance object consumption/destruction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectInstanceDestroyedOnTrigger data.

findings.issue: Darkness blocks Darkvision and nonmagical light, can be blocked by opaque cover when object-originated, and dispels spell-created Bright/Dim Light of level 2 or lower; these are mostly prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add magical darkness fields for vision blockers, nonmagical-light immunity, object-origin opaque cover blocker, and lower/equal spell-light dispel.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime magicalDarkness data for Darkvision blocking, nonmagical light blocking, opaque cover blocking, and dispel-overlapping-light spell level <= 2.

findings.issue: Mirror Image redirects hits using a d6 roll for each remaining duplicate, but runtime still has only a corrected prose description and no interception model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add defensive duplicate interception fields for trigger on hit, dice per remaining duplicate, success threshold, redirect target, and duplicate destruction.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime duplicateInterception data: base duplicates 3, roll d6 per duplicate, any 3+ redirects hit to one duplicate.

findings.issue: Duplicates are destroyed only by redirected hits and ignore all other damage/effects; the spell ends when all three are destroyed. Runtime has no duplicate object state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add duplicate lifecycle fields for destruction trigger, immunity to other damage/effects, remaining count, and ends_when_all_destroyed.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime duplicateLifecycle data.

findings.issue: Bright and dim radii are now represented, but object-origin Emanation, opaque-cover blocking, and dispelling overlapping Darkness from level 3 or lower are still prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add light source mode fields, opaque cover blocker fields, and darkness dispel interaction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lightMode, lightBlocker, and dispelDarkness data.

findings.issue: Dispel Magic can target a creature, object, or magical effect; runtime now allows creatures and objects, but magical effects are not a valid target category.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add magical_effect as a target category or a spell-effect target family.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target support for magical effects.

findings.issue: For ongoing spells of level 4 or higher, Dispel Magic requires a spellcasting ability check against DC 10 plus spell level; runtime stores the check in prose only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-check resolution fields for spellcasting ability checks with formula DCs.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dispelCheck data for spellcasting ability versus 10 + spell level.

findings.issue: Ongoing spells end automatically up to the cast slot level and end on successful checks above that level; runtime has no typed dispel/ending data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dispel fields for auto-ended spell level threshold and checked spell level threshold.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dispelMagic data for automatic and checked ending.

findings.issue: Dispel Magic's magical-effect target type has no runtime target category.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add magical_effect target eligibility.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime validTargets support for magical effects or a spellEffectTarget branch.

findings.issue: Glyph of Warding has movement-break and trigger-consumption ending rules that are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditionalEnding fields for moved distance and one-shot trigger consumption.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for moved-more-than-10-feet break and ends-on-trigger.

findings.issue: Ranged weapon attacks that enter the wall's space have disadvantage, and fire damage is halved if the fire effect passes through the wall; both are only in utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall-interaction modifier fields for ranged weapon attack disadvantage and damage-type reduction through the wall.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime attackThroughArea and damageThroughArea modifier data.

findings.issue: The wall's space is difficult terrain, cold damage can freeze 5-foot-square sections, and destroyed frozen sections leave gaps that water does not refill; runtime only stores most of this in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/wall state fields for difficult terrain, freeze transformation, section size, and non-refill gaps.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrain plus section-state data for difficult terrain and frozen/destroyed sections.

findings.issue: Each 5-foot-square frozen section has AC 5 and 15 Hit Points and is destroyed at 0 HP; runtime has no typed destructible-section stats.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object/section AC, HP, size, and destroyed-at-zero fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime destructible section stats for frozen wall portions.

findings.issue: Cold damage passing through the wall freezes part of it, fire damage through it is halved, and destroyed sections remain empty; these environmental interactions are only prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental interaction fields keyed by damage type and pass-through condition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalInteractions data for cold freezing, fire halving, and destroyed-section gaps.

findings.issue: Destroying the Tiny replica chest ends the spell, but runtime lacks typed dependency/destruction semantics for the material replica.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add component-dependency fields for destroyable linked objects that end a spell.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime linkedComponentDependency data for the replica chest.

findings.issue: An enclosed creature can spend an action to roll the sphere at up to half its Speed, and other creatures can pick up and move the globe; runtime stores this movement only in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add enclosed-object movement fields for internal push action, half-speed cap, and external pickup/move.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sphereMovement data.

findings.issue: The incoming attack disadvantage from Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead is now represented, but Dismissal's Charisma save and planar send-home branch remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add special-function action fields for Dismissal with Charisma save and planar movement outcome.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dismissalAction data.

findings.issue: Break Enchantment removes possession, Charmed, or Frightened caused by qualifying creature types; runtime lacks typed source-filtered condition/possession removal fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add source-filtered removal fields for possession and conditions caused by specific creature types.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime breakEnchantment data.

findings.issue: Break Enchantment and Dismissal can remove possessed, Charmed, Frightened, or relocate a creature; only the attack-roll disadvantage is typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add special-function status removal and dismissal fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime specialFunctions data for Break Enchantment and Dismissal.

findings.issue: Runtime has the attack grant and ammunition creation, but lacks typed ending if the quiver leaves possession and disintegration of created ammunition when the spell ends.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add possession-based ending and created-ammunition cleanup fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime swiftQuiverEnding data.

findings.issue: Created ammunition disintegrates when the spell ends; runtime lacks typed cleanup/aftermath data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-object cleanup fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdAmmunitionCleanup data.

findings.issue: If the wall cuts through a creature's space, the creature is pushed to a chosen side; runtime lacks this push effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall-creation displacement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallDisplacement data.

findings.issue: Runtime now marks the utility as creation and captures geometry, but physical pass-through blocking, damage immunity, Dispel Magic immunity, and Disintegrate destruction remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add wall barrier/material immunity and spell-destruction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallBarrierProperties data.

findings.issue: The wall extends into the Ethereal Plane and blocks ethereal travel, but this planar blocking is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ethereal-plane blocking fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarTravelBlock data.

findings.issue: The wall is created and partially sized, but nonmagical object status, permanence, dispel immunity after permanence, and collapse relationships are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-structure object lifecycle fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime stoneWallStructureProperties data.

findings.issue: The spell can target creations of magical force and automatically disintegrate a Large-or-smaller nonmagical object or magical-force creation, but runtime lacks an object/force-creation destruction branch.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object and magical-force creation disintegration fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime disintegrateObjectBranch data.

findings.issue: Disintegration at 0 hit points, nonmagical worn/carried item destruction, True Resurrection/Wish revival restriction, automatic Large-or-smaller object destruction, and Huge-or-larger 10-foot Cube partial destruction remain prose-only beyond the damage description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add disintegration aftermath and partial-object destruction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime disintegrationAftermath data.

findings.issue: The spell ends when the object is summoned, and the runtime prose also notes Dispel Magic or similar effects on the sapphire end the spell; these ending conditions are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked-token destruction/use and dispel-on-token ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime instantSummonsEnding data.

findings.issue: Individual ward effects can be removed by Dispel Magic, the whole spell ends only when all effects are gone, and animated trees lose magic/reroot when the spell ends; runtime lacks these ending conditions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-subeffect dispel and guardian ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime druidGroveEnding data.

findings.issue: The container stores souls, can be destroyed, is destroyed when the spell ends, and possession replaces several caster statistics with host values; runtime lacks object lifecycle and stat-replacement fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add soul-container lifecycle and host-stat replacement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime soulContainer and hostStatReplacement data.

findings.issue: The container is destroyed when the spell ends; runtime lacks on-spell-end object destruction data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add on-spell-end object aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime onSpellEndObjectDestruction data.

findings.issue: Steal Life healing and Borrow Experience advantage are represented, but runtime lacks a generic next-roll advantage token for attack/check/save use.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add next-roll advantage token fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime nextRollAdvantage data.

findings.issue: Eyes of the Dead creates an invisible sensor at a remembered place on the current plane for concentration up to 10 minutes and provides visual/auditory information; runtime records this as an option but lacks first-class remote sensor fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add remote sensor placement, visibility, plane, concentration, and feed fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime remoteSensor data.

findings.issue: Query Soul provides a no-action telepathic truthful answer regardless of language with length/knowledge limits; runtime records this as an option but lacks first-class query/answer fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add telepathic query fields with answer truthfulness, knowledge, and length limits.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime soulQuery data.

findings.issue: Eyes of the Dead requires the named place to be on the caster's current plane; runtime lacks first-class same-plane remote-sensor eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add plane eligibility fields for remote sensors.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensorPlaneRestriction data.

findings.issue: The material cage stores the soul and can be destroyed to end the spell, but runtime lacks object lifecycle/destroy-to-end fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add soul-container object lifecycle fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime soulContainer data.

findings.issue: The spell ends when the cage is destroyed or after the sixth exploit releases the soul; runtime records this as options but lacks first-class use-count and object-destruction end triggers.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add use-count and object-destruction ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime useCountEndCondition and objectDestroyedEndCondition data.

findings.issue: Wall placement on a solid surface and alternate hemisphere/globe/panel geometry are represented, but TerrainEffect cannot encode Wall/Hemisphere forms directly and uses schema-safe Square for terrain effect geometry.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add first-class wall/hemisphere/globe terrain effect shapes and solid-surface placement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime terrainWallGeometry data.

findings.issue: The ice wall, destructible sections, and frigid-air remains are represented, but runtime lacks first-class section destruction replacement fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add destructible section replacement/remnant fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime destroyedSectionReplacement data.

findings.issue: Wall section AC and HP are represented in wallProperties, but damage immunities and vulnerability are still prose because terrain wallProperties lacks immunity/vulnerability fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object/terrain damage immunity and vulnerability fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wallDamageProfile data.

findings.issue: The Charisma save is only required when a trapped creature tries teleportation or interplanar travel; runtime has utility options but lacks conditional escape-save fields keyed to travel attempts.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional escape-save fields for blocked travel effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime escapeSave or blockedTravelSave data.

findings.issue: Teleportation, interplanar travel, and ethereal travel blocking are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class travel-blocking fields with save and wasted-effect outcomes.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add blocked travel mode fields with save outcomes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime blockedTravel data for teleportation, interplanar travel, and ethereal travel.

findings.issue: Damage-ending and custom early-ending conditions are preserved in status break triggers and utility options, but runtime lacks arbitrary visible-within-1-mile ending condition fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add custom conditional ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime customEndCondition data with triggerRange.

findings.issue: The simulacrum is represented as SUMMONING and utility options, but runtime lacks first-class copied-stat exceptions, half maximum Hit Points, cannot-cast-this-spell, cannot-rest, and cannot-level fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add copied creature exception fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime copiedCreatureOverrides data.

findings.issue: Half Hit Point maximum, damage repair, 0 HP snow reversion, and recast destruction are preserved in effects/options, but runtime lacks typed copied-entity HP maximum and destruction/reversion fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add copied entity HP maximum and destruction/reversion fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime copiedEntityStats and destructionOutcome data.

findings.issue: Trigger examples, creature-type refinements, password-like exclusions, and object movement breakage are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class configurable ward trigger/refinement fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add configurable ward trigger, trigger refinement, and exclusion fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wardTriggerRules data.

findings.issue: The glyph can end without triggering if moved too far, and triggered light lasts 10 minutes before the spell ends; runtime lacks first-class moved-too-far break and triggered-duration ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object movement break and triggered duration ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wardBreakDistance and triggeredDurationEnd data.

findings.issue: Illumination choice, opaque magical force, shimmer, and incense are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class selectable illumination and sensory atmosphere fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add selectable light and sensory atmosphere fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime selectableIllumination and atmosphereSensory data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Sunburst needs light/darkness interaction fields for dispelling Darkness created by any spell.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add light/darkness interaction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dispelsDarkness or lightInteraction object.

findings.issue: Actionable open: The prison/globe/chains/demiplane/gemstone created containment forms need a durable created-prison schema with containment, passability, and dispel targets.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a created containment/prison bucket for durable prisons with mode-specific boundaries and dispel targets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON records each form in Utility Options and spatial measured details but not as created prison objects.

findings.issue: Actionable open: AC 10 is stored, but hp is unknown and layer-specific destruction methods are missing from canonical capture.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add complete layer stat/destruction rows once the table is captured.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON uses wallProperties AC 10 with hp 0 sentinel plus Utility Options.

groups.title: Needs Manual Subfamily
groups.closureRule: No confident keyword match; classify manually before editing.

findings.issue: The spell provides knowledge of whether Hallow is active and where it is, but that payload is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for detected spell/effect presence and location.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledge data for Hallow presence and location.

findings.issue: The spell identifies the kind of poison, poisonous creature, or contagion, but that knowledge payload is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for detected kind/category.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledge data for kind identification.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Healing prevention, stabilization, or condition/restoration removal needs explicit restoration/prevention schema beyond generic utility text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration, condition-removal, and healing-prevention buckets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing healing/status/utility effects until those buckets are propagated.

findings.issue: Goodberry creates a fixed count of ten magic berries, but count, item identity, and duration are not first-class created-object data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created consumable object fields for object name, count, location, duration, and magical state.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdObject/consumableResource data for ten berries appearing in hand.

findings.issue: Augury has a repeated-casting risk that accumulates until Long Rest, but it is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repeated-casting risk fields for reset cadence, starting cast count, cumulative chance, and no-answer outcome.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatCastRisk data for cumulative 25 percent no-answer chance after the first casting before Long Rest.

findings.issue: Augury's knowledge payload has a time-bound planned-action question and explicit reliability caveat that are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledge payload fields for planned-action horizon, information source, result table, and caveats.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgeEffect data for otherworldly omen, 30-minute planned-action horizon, and changed-circumstance limitation.

findings.issue: Enlarge/Reduce target eligibility differs by target kind: objects must be unattended, and only unwilling creatures get a save.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target-kind-specific eligibility and save-condition fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectEligibility.notWornOrCarried and saveAppliesTo unwilling_creature.

findings.issue: Gust of Wind changes movement cost directionally, but the cost is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement cost multiplier fields with direction condition.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementCost data: 2 feet per 1 foot when moving closer to caster within the Line.

findings.issue: Magic Weapon's target must be a nonmagical weapon, but runtime target eligibility is generic objects.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object target eligibility fields for weapon category and nonmagical requirement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectFilter category weapon and magical false.

findings.issue: Protection from Poison removes Poisoned immediately, but condition removal is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add condition-removal fields for named condition ended on cast.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionRemoval Poisoned.

findings.issue: Shining Smite is cast after a triggering weapon or unarmed hit, but runtime timing does not preserve that trigger.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add casting trigger fields for after-hit smite-style spells, including allowed attack sources and target binding.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime castingTrigger data for immediately after hitting a creature with a weapon or Unarmed Strike.

findings.issue: Blinding Smite is cast after a triggering melee weapon or unarmed hit, but runtime timing does not preserve that trigger.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add casting trigger fields for after-hit smite-style spells, including allowed attack sources and target binding.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime castingTrigger data for immediately after hitting a creature with a melee weapon or Unarmed Strike.

findings.issue: Elemental Weapon specifically requires a nonmagical weapon target.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object subtype and nonmagical target filter fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectFilter for weapon and nonmagical.

findings.issue: The target weapon becoming magical is a state change not represented in runtime data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object state fields for becomes_magic_weapon.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime objectStateChange data for magic weapon.

findings.issue: The tower creates an interior environmental state that protects occupants from outside weather.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-environment fields for interior warmth/dryness and weather isolation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange data for warm, dry interior independent of outside conditions.

findings.issue: The higher-slot extra-story scaling is not represented as structure scaling data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-structure slot scaling fields for story count.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime structureScaling data for +1 story per slot above 3.

findings.issue: Gaseous Form grants saving throw advantage for three abilities, but that modifier is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add savingThrowAdvantage fields for ability lists.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveModifier data for Strength, Dexterity, and Constitution advantage.

findings.issue: Gaseous Form replaces movement with limited flying, hover, and overlapping creature-space movement.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movementOverride fields for fly speed, hover, only-movement restriction, and space-occupancy permission.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementOverride data for fly 10, hover, only movement, and mayOccupyCreatureSpace.

findings.issue: The mist form and its action/object restrictions are not represented as state data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformationState and restrictedCapabilities fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformation data for misty cloud state, carried gear included, no speech, no object manipulation, no attacks, and no spellcasting.

findings.issue: The Blinded condition is represented, but its precise fully-within gating is not.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add areaMembership condition fields such as fully_within_area.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime condition areaMembership=fully_within for Blinded.

findings.issue: Hypnotic Pattern's Charmed and Incapacitated statuses are represented, but Speed 0 and dependent rider semantics are not.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status-rider movement override fields and dependent-status relationship fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementOverride speed 0 while Charmed and requiresStatus Charmed for Incapacitated.

findings.issue: Incite Greed's charm imposes a specific compelled behavior that is not represented by the generic Charmed condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add compelledBehavior fields for allowed actions and safe approach target.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime compelledBehavior data: only movement toward caster by safe route.

findings.issue: Incite Greed applies a proximity-gated movement lock that is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add proximity-gated movement restriction fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementRestriction data for cannot move while within 5 feet of caster.

findings.issue: Intellect Fortress grants Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throw advantage, but this is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add savingThrowAdvantage fields for ability lists.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveModifier data for Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma advantage.

findings.issue: Tiny Hut creates a comfortable, dry interior independent of outside weather.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmentalChange fields for comfortable/dry interior and weather isolation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange data for comfortable, dry interior independent of outside weather.

findings.issue: The expulsion Prone condition is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional status fields tied to expulsion.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime expulsionEffect applying Prone.

findings.issue: Meld into Stone restricts movement except for a 5-foot movement exit.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movementRestriction and exitCost fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementRestriction cannotMoveExceptExit with exitCost 5 feet.

findings.issue: Nondetection target categories are represented, but willing creature and 10-foot maximum object/place size are not.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target willingness and max dimension fields for object/place targets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetFilter.willing for creatures and maxDimensionFeet 10 for object/place targets.

findings.issue: The created tack and its 10-foot separation vanish rule are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add createdEquipment and distance-based disappearance fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdEquipment saddle/bit/bridle with vanishDistanceFromSteed 10 feet.

findings.issue: Revivify requires a dead creature that died within the last minute and excludes old age deaths.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add death-state target filters for max time since death and old-age exclusion.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetFilter dead=true, diedWithin 1 minute, excludeDeathCause old_age.

findings.issue: Revivify restores a dead creature to life with exactly 1 HP, which is not ordinary healing data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add revive/restoration fields with fixed resulting HP.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime REVIVE or restoration effect setting revived target HP to 1.

findings.issue: Revivify revives without restoring missing body parts; that limitation is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration limitation fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime reviveLimitations doesNotRestoreMissingBodyParts.

findings.issue: Sending has a rich communication payload that is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add communication fields for word limit, target qualification, mental delivery, immediate reply, and meaning comprehension.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime communication data for wordLimit 25, mentalMessage, immediateReply, and comprehendMeaning.

findings.issue: Sending target eligibility depends on having met the target or receiving a description from someone who has met it.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target familiarity/description eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime targetQualification metByCaster or describedBySomeoneWhoMetTarget.

findings.issue: The recurring area entry/start trigger is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring area trigger fields with once-per-turn entry handling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime areaTrigger enters_first_time_on_turn or turn_start.

findings.issue: This detector row is not healing; it is an environmental extinguish effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add exposed flame extinguish fields under environmental effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange extinguishExposedFlamesInArea.

findings.issue: Sleet Storm creates heavily obscured weather and douses exposed flames, but both are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add heavilyObscured and extinguishFlames environmental fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange for heavily obscured area and exposed flame dousing.

findings.issue: The corpse knowledge boundaries are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add knowledgeBoundary fields for life knowledge, no new information, no post-death comprehension, no future speculation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgeLimits data for the corpse answers.

findings.issue: Spirit Guardians damage is partially represented, but movement slowing and recurring once-per-turn triggers are not.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add emanation speed modifier and once-per-turn area trigger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime speedMultiplier 0.5 in emanation and area triggers for emanation enters, creature enters, or creature ends turn, once per turn.

findings.issue: Spirit Guardians lets the caster designate unaffected creatures at cast time.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add cast-time excluded targets fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime excludedTargets chosenOnCast for unaffected creatures.

findings.issue: Tidal Wave creates a configurable water volume up to 30 x 10 x 10 feet, but runtime only has a line length.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area width and height fields for cuboid/volume effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime area dimensions length 30, width 10, height 10.

findings.issue: The conjured water exists briefly, spreads, extinguishes flames, and vanishes; that lifecycle is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary created substance lifecycle fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdWater lifecycle crash/spread/extinguish/vanish.

findings.issue: The flame-extinguishing water spread is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental water spread and extinguish fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalChange for spread, extinguish unprotected flames, and vanish.

findings.issue: The aura prevents living creatures other than Constructs and Undead from passing or reaching through it while still allowing spells and Ranged or Reach weapon attacks; runtime lacks typed barrier pass/reach restrictions and exception filters.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add creature-barrier fields for pass-through prevention, reach-through prevention, excluded creature types, and allowed ranged/reach/spell interactions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime barrierRestriction data.

findings.issue: The area placement point must be on ground or in a body of water, but runtime targeting has no surface eligibility data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add placement surface eligibility fields for area points.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime placementSurface data with ground and body_of_water values.

findings.issue: The target's death aftermath happens at the start of the caster's next turn and needs a typed aftermath/timing surface.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add start-of-next-turn death aftermath fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime deathAftermath timing data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: caster-specified creature-kind filters and proximity-trigger saves are still richer than the current target filter and trigger schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add structured fields for caster-specified creature kind and proximity-trigger radius around a spell target.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime fields for open-ended creature-kind filters and a proximity trigger such as on_enter_target_radius with radius/duration/immunity metadata.

groups.title: Transfer, Retarget, Or Reassignment
groups.closureRule: An effect ends on one target, moves to another target, or can be reassigned while the spell remains active.

findings.issue: Chromatic Orb requires choosing one of six damage types and can leap to additional chosen targets when two or more damage dice match, but runtime JSON stores the damage types as a slash-delimited string and has no leap mechanic.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add chosen damage type fields and chained-target leap fields for duplicate damage dice, target distance from previous target, target uniqueness, and slot-level leap cap.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime choice data for selected damage type and chain/leap data for duplicate d8 triggers, additional attack rolls, fresh damage rolls, and one-target-per-casting limits.

findings.issue: Chromatic Orb's leap requires a new attack roll and new damage roll against the new target; JSON only represents the initial attack damage.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add secondary attack fields for conditional chained attacks.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime secondary attack data triggered by duplicate damage dice.

findings.issue: If the cursed target drops to 0 Hit Points before the spell ends, the caster can move the curse to a new creature with a later Bonus Action; this transfer rule is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional transfer fields for trigger target_drops_to_0_hp, later bonus-action retargeting, and new creature target.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime curseTransfer data for 0-HP trigger and later bonus-action retargeting.

findings.issue: Hex grants a later bonus-action curse transfer after the current cursed target drops to 0 HP, but that follow-up action is not modeled.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add follow-up action fields for conditional retargeting after target_drops_to_0_hp.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime followUpAction or curseTransfer data with bonus_action cost and later-turn timing.

findings.issue: If the marked target drops to 0 Hit Points before the spell ends, the caster can move the mark to a new visible creature with a Bonus Action; duration also scales at higher slots.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional transfer fields and duration scaling fields for Hunter's Mark.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime markTransfer data for 0-HP retargeting and durationScaling thresholds for slots 3-4 and 5+.

findings.issue: A failed save against Sanctuary forces the attacker to choose a new target or lose the attack/spell, but runtime JSON keeps that branch in description text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add failed-save forced-choice fields for choose_new_target_or_lose_action.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime failedSaveOptions data for choosing a new target or losing the attack/damaging spell.

findings.issue: Sanctuary's Wisdom save trigger for creatures targeting the warded creature is represented, but the trigger does not distinguish attack rolls from damaging spells or the area-of-effect bypass.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward targeting-trigger fields for attack roll, damaging spell, and area-of-effect exclusion.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime wardTrigger data that includes attack rolls and damaging spells but excludes area effects.

findings.issue: Sanctuary is a ward with incoming targeting triggers and area-effect bypass; current utility effects preserve some behavior but flatten trigger scope and failed-save options.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ward fields for protected target, incoming trigger kinds, save, failed-save options, area bypass, and end conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ward data instead of splitting the mechanic across generic utility descriptions.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Mode choices need first-class mode/option fields when a spell exposes several distinct operations.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a choice/mode bucket with option-specific targets/effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Keep existing Utility Options or descriptions until mode schema propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object stats, structure durability, or object transformations need explicit AC/HP/passability/damageability fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object stat/damageability bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current spatial/utility fields until propagation.

findings.issue: Life Transference links a chosen visible target's healing amount to twice the actual self-damage taken, but runtime only applies damage.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked healing fields that can reference actual damage taken by another effect.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime linked HEALING effect equal to 2x actual unreduced Necrotic damage taken by caster.

findings.issue: Life Transference's self-damage cannot be reduced and should be bound to the caster, but runtime does not type either constraint.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damageReductionBypass and effectTarget/selfCost fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime damage flag cannotBeReduced and caster self-damage target binding.

findings.issue: Life Transference's healing effect and its twice-actual-damage formula are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add healingFormula fields that can reference actual damage taken from a paired effect.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime HEALING effect with formula twice actual self-damage taken.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Healing, restoration, transfer, or condition removal needs specific restoration/prevention fields beyond generic utility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration/condition-removal/healing-transfer bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current HEALING/UTILITY effects until propagation.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Healing, restoration, transfer, or condition removal needs specific restoration/prevention fields beyond generic utility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration/condition-removal/healing-transfer bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current HEALING/UTILITY effects until propagation.

findings.issue: Remove Curse ends ordinary curses and has a different cursed-magic-item branch that breaks attunement without ending the item curse.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add curseRemoval and cursedMagicItem attunement-break fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime curseEffect data for end curses on creature/object and break owner attunement for cursed magic items.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Healing, restoration, transfer, or condition removal needs specific restoration/prevention fields beyond generic utility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration/condition-removal/healing-transfer bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current HEALING/UTILITY effects until propagation.

findings.issue: Speak with Dead has a 10-day retarget failure and a five-question limit.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add priorTargetCooldown and maxQuestions fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime castFailure if targetedWithinPastDays 10 and maxQuestions 5.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Healing, restoration, transfer, or condition removal needs specific restoration/prevention fields beyond generic utility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration/condition-removal/healing-transfer bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current HEALING/UTILITY effects until propagation.

findings.issue: Until the spell ends, the caster can make the melee spell attack again on each turn as a Magic action against the same or different creature, but the current runtime does not model repeat attacks as granted actions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained repeat-attack fields for action type, cadence, attack reuse, and target-retargeting permission.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime granted/repeat action data for the per-turn Magic action attack.

findings.issue: The target is not summoned, but it is behaviorally constrained by a command and penalized for acting counter to it; runtime lacks geas/control-obligation fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Track this under a control-obligation field family rather than summon fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime geasObligation/controlCompliance data.

findings.issue: The Charmed target's behavior is constrained by a socially framed command, including service/refrain choices and understanding requirements; runtime lacks typed social-control semantics.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add social-control command fields for compelled service or abstention.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime socialCommandConstraint data.

findings.issue: Remove Curse, Greater Restoration, or Wish can end the spell; runtime lacks typed external-spell removal/ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add removableBySpell fields listing spells that can end a spell effect.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime removableBySpells data.

findings.issue: Runtime represents the Charmed condition but not the once-per-day 5d10 Psychic damage when the Charmed target acts directly counter to the command.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add command-violation damage fields with once-per-day frequency.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditional violationDamage data keyed to command noncompliance.

findings.issue: The spell ends on suicidal commands and can be ended by specific spells; runtime lacks typed conditional ending fields for both cases.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional-ending fields for forbidden command endings and external spell removal.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data.

findings.issue: Greater Restoration's restoration choices are flattened into prose; runtime cannot distinguish Exhaustion removal, condition removal, curse/attunement removal, ability-score restoration, or hit-point-maximum restoration.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration-removal fields for exhaustion levels, named conditions, curses including cursed-item attunement, ability-score reductions, and hit-point-maximum reductions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restorationOptions data with one schema-safe option per removable effect family.

findings.issue: The caster must speak the memory description and the target must understand the caster's language; runtime lacks language/comprehension fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spoken-instruction and target-language-comprehension fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime memoryInstructionCommunication data.

findings.issue: Remove Curse or Greater Restoration can restore the true memory; runtime lacks typed external-spell restoration fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add removable/restorable-by-spell fields for altered memories.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime restoredBySpells data.

findings.issue: The modified memory takes hold when the spell ends only if the description is complete; runtime lacks typed memory aftermath/finalization data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add memory finalization fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime memoryFinalization data.

findings.issue: The revived target takes a -4 penalty to attacks, saves, and ability checks that decreases by 1 after each long rest; runtime has no typed decaying penalty fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add decaying resurrection penalty fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime resurrectionPenalty data.

findings.issue: The spell restores life at 1 HP, neutralizes poison, cures nonmagical disease, closes mortal wounds, and does not remove magical disease/curses; runtime keeps this as prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add resurrection restoration fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime raiseDeadRestoration data.

findings.issue: The long-rest Hit Dice transfer requires the homunculus to be on the same plane of existence; runtime lacks same-plane eligibility for that later resource transfer.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add same-plane linked-entity eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime homunculusPlaneEligibility data.

findings.issue: The self-damage, unreducible damage, Hit Dice spending, caster hit point maximum reduction, homunculus hit point maximum/current hit point increase, 1 HP floor, long-rest ending, death ending, one-homunculus limit, and spell-failure condition remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked-created-creature stat transfer and singleton summon fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime homunculusBond data.

findings.issue: Wake-on-damage/shake, Panicked distance-and-sight ending, and cannot-retarget-a-creature-that-succeeded-against-this-casting are preserved in descriptions but not first-class ending/state fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add per-option ending and per-casting target-immunity fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime eyebiteEnding data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Clone needs a delayed created-entity/lifecycle schema rather than only utility option text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity lifecycle fields for formation delay, vessel dependency, inert state, activation trigger, and age choice.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add a runtime createdEntity/lifecycle object with growth duration, activation trigger, soul-transfer prerequisites, and equipment/remains consequences.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Clone exposes identity, memories, soul location, and revival lockout mechanics that need a dedicated life-state schema.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add life-state/identity transfer fields for soul transfer, memory/personality continuity, equipment exclusion, and revival lockout.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifeStateTransition fields that can be ignored when not applicable and consumed by resurrection/death systems later.

groups.title: Sustain, Range, Cover, Or Upkeep
groups.closureRule: A later action, range requirement, total-cover condition, or upkeep failure ends the spell or effect.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Repeat action and sustain behavior needs a stronger granted-action/sustain schema for low-level utility cantrips.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustain/reposition action fields with action cost, range leash, and recurrence.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options/grantedActions as interim runtime representation.

findings.issue: Mold Earth limits non-instantaneous active effects to two and allows dismissing one as an action.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add active effect cap and dismiss action fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime activeEffectLimit and dismissAction data.

findings.issue: Shape Water limits non-instantaneous effects to two active instances and lets the caster dismiss one as an action; this is not structured.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Use active effect cap and dismiss action fields shared with Mold Earth-like cantrips.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime activeEffectLimit=2 for non-instantaneous modes and dismissAction=action.

findings.issue: Expeditious Retreat immediately grants Dash and then grants Dash again as a Bonus Action until the spell ends, but runtime JSON keeps this in a generic utility description with grantedActions empty.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add granted action fields for immediate Dash and recurring bonus-action Dash while active.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime grantedActions data for immediate Dash and bonus-action Dash.

findings.issue: Each Goodberry restores 1 Hit Point when eaten, but the runtime JSON has no healing effect tied to berry consumption.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add consumable healing fields for fixed HP restoration triggered by eating a created item.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime healing data for each berry restoring 1 HP on bonus-action consumption.

findings.issue: Once on each caster turn, a Bonus Action can mentally command the servant to move up to 15 feet and interact with an object; runtime only stores commandCost bonus_action and objectDescription prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled entity command fields for frequency, action cost, mental command, movement distance, and object interaction.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime commandOptions data for once-per-turn bonus-action move/interact command.

findings.issue: Witch Bolt's initial range, initial damage, later-turn Bonus Action cost, and sustain scaling have been corrected, but the automatic sustain damage is not explicitly tied to the sustained arc/target relationship.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained-link damage fields for later-turn automatic damage independent of initial hit.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed stale range/damage/action/scaling data; add runtime sustainedLink data for the automatic 1d12 Bonus Action damage.

findings.issue: The sustained lightning arc is a maintained link between caster and target, but runtime JSON represents it only as concentration plus a later action damage effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained link fields for caster-target arc effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sustainedLink data for the lightning arc.

findings.issue: The mental target choice and compelled attack control affect creature behavior but are flattened into a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Represent this under compelled-action control rather than generic social/knowledge prose.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime compelledAction data as described in the choice/mode finding.

findings.issue: If the caster lets go of the blade it disappears, and the caster can evoke it again as a Bonus Action; this object persistence/re-evoke action is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conjured-object persistence fields for disappears_on_release and reevoke action cost.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conjuredWeapon lifecycle data for release disappearance and bonus-action re-evocation.

findings.issue: The caster can move the sphere up to 30 feet as a Bonus Action, but runtime still uses on_caster_action without a typed movable-area action model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movable hazard fields for action cost, move distance, movement mode, and stop-on-creature behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movableArea action data for bonus-action roll up to 30 feet.

findings.issue: Changing the Line direction as a later-turn Bonus Action is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add later-turn action fields for changing an active area direction.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime activeAreaUpdate action cost bonus_action for direction change.

findings.issue: The later-turn Bonus Action can both move the force up to 20 feet and repeat the attack from the force's position; runtime now has the bonus-action sustain cost but still lacks controlled-force movement data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustain action fields that combine moving a persistent effect and making an attack from its new position.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledEntity movement data for moving the force up to 20 feet before the repeated attack.

findings.issue: A Bonus Action can mentally command controlled creatures within 60 feet, and recasting before 24 hours reasserts control; runtime only stores this as prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled-summon command action and recast-to-maintain-control fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime commandAction and reassertControl data.

findings.issue: Call Lightning's repeat Magic action to call another bolt is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustain/reuse action fields for Magic action repeat strikes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sustainAction/repeatEffect data for repeated lightning calls.

findings.issue: Switching between seeing and hearing is a Bonus Action; runtime prose was corrected, but no typed action field exists.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sensor mode switch action fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sensorModeSwitch actionCost bonus_action.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Repeat actions, recasts, and sustain behavior need stronger action-economy fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustain/recast action bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options/grantedActions as interim representation.

findings.issue: Melfs Minute Meteors has an initial spend and repeat bonus-action spend loop that is not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add initialAndSustainAction fields for expendable spell instances.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime initialSpend plus bonus_action sustain spend 1-2 meteors.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Repeat actions, recasts, and sustain behavior need stronger action-economy fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustain/recast action bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use Utility Options/grantedActions as interim representation.

findings.issue: Tiny Servant uses a recurring bonus action to command one or multiple servants.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add summon command action fields including multi-servant same-command rule.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledSummon command data for bonus action, any/all controlled servants, same command.

findings.issue: The Bonus Action repeat attack is a sustained spell action from the vine's position; runtime lacks repeat action semantics.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained/repeat attack fields for bonus-action repeats from created entities.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatAttack data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses a creature within 60 feet of the sphere's center for the bonus-action lightning bolt each turn; runtime represents the bonus-action attack but lacks a typed secondary-origin target-choice field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained secondary-origin target choice fields for effects emitted from created areas or objects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime secondaryOriginTargetChoice data for the lightning bolt.

findings.issue: The bonus-action lightning bolt is now represented as an on_caster_action damage effect, but the schema cannot fully express that the attack originates from the sphere center and targets within 60 feet of that secondary origin.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained action fields for secondary origin, per-turn action cost, target range from origin, and attack type.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Extend the current on_caster_action effect with typed secondary-origin metadata when supported.

findings.issue: On cast and as a bonus action later, the caster can move the hand up to 60 feet and choose an effect; while grappling, a bonus action can crush the target. Runtime lacks this sustained action economy.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained created-entity action fields for move-plus-mode and grapple-crush action.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime handCommandActions data.

findings.issue: The caster can use a bonus action to mentally command all created undead within 60 feet with the same command; runtime lacks command action economy and command range fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled-creature command fields for bonus action, mental command, same-command multi-control, and range.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime undeadCommand data.

findings.issue: If the caster is within 60 feet of the cylinder, they can move it up to 60 feet as a bonus action; runtime lacks created-area reposition action fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained area movement fields for controller range, action cost, and movement distance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movableAreaAction data.

findings.issue: Runtime has the initial Dexterity save but flattens success as half damage; canonical success is 2d8 and spell ends, while failure is 4d8 and enables sustained damage.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-branch damage fields with different success/failure dice and branch outcomes.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime branchedSaveDamage data.

findings.issue: After a failed save, the caster can use an action each turn to automatically deal 4d8 Necrotic damage; the spell ends if the caster uses the action for anything else. Runtime lacks sustained action and missed-action ending fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained damage action fields with required action each turn and fail-to-sustain ending.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sustainDamageAction data.

findings.issue: The spell ends on successful initial save, on caster using an action for anything else, when target leaves range, or when target has total cover; runtime lacks these branch and ending conditions.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add branch-ending and sustain-ending fields for save success, action use, range loss, and total cover.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime enervationEnding data.

findings.issue: On each later turn before the spell ends, the caster can use a bonus action to teleport again; runtime has the teleport effect but lacks repeat granted-action semantics.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repeat teleport action fields for bonus-action reuse while active.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatTeleportAction data.

findings.issue: The action to move and animate the illusory double and the repeat bonus-action sense switch are prose-only in runtime.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion-control action and repeat sense-toggle fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime grantedActions for double movement/animation and sense switching.

findings.issue: The caster can use a Bonus Action to change the open-side facing; runtime lacks a granted bonus action or portal-facing update operation.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained portal-facing action fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add grantedActions entry for changing portal facing.

findings.issue: Blindsight, seeing while blinded or in darkness, invisible-creature visibility, hiding exception, and total-cover exception are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class sense/visibility exception fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sense grant and visibility exception fields for blindsight, invisible creatures, hidden creatures, darkness, blindness, and total cover.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime senseGrant or perceptionMode data instead of relying only on UTILITY controlOptions.

findings.issue: The transformation into draconic features is represented by utility options plus movement/damage effects, but runtime lacks a first-class transformation/state-change payload for feature bundles.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add transformation feature bundle fields when the transformation bucket is propagated.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transformationFeatureBundle data for spells that grant bundled temporary form features.

groups.title: Object Stats, Damageability, Or Capacity
groups.closureRule: Created or affected objects need hit points, AC, damageability, capacity, size limits, or structural state.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Healing prevention, stabilization, or condition/restoration removal needs explicit restoration/prevention schema beyond generic utility text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration, condition-removal, and healing-prevention buckets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing healing/status/utility effects until those buckets are propagated.

findings.issue: Mending repairs object damage with a one-foot size limit and a magic-item caveat, but structured and JSON only store a generic utility description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add repair utility fields for break/tear repair, max damaged dimension, and magic-item-magic-not-restored caveat.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime utility repair data instead of relying on description text.

findings.issue: Toll the Dead switches from d8 to d12 damage when the target is missing any Hit Points; JSON only preserves this in scaling prose while damage.dice remains 1d8.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional damage dice fields based on target missing HP.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalDamage data for undamaged target d8 versus damaged target d12, including tier scaling for both dice.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Healing prevention, stabilization, or condition/restoration removal needs explicit restoration/prevention schema beyond generic utility text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restoration, condition-removal, and healing-prevention buckets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use existing healing/status/utility effects until those buckets are propagated.

findings.issue: Cure Wounds heals 2d8 plus the caster's spellcasting ability modifier, but runtime healing only stores dice 2d8.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add healing formula fields for spellcasting ability modifier and slot-scaling dice.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime healing modifier data for plus spellcasting ability modifier.

findings.issue: Heroism grants recurring Temporary Hit Points, but runtime JSON does not represent them as healing or temporary HP data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary-HP fields that support spellcasting ability modifier amounts and recurring timing.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime temporaryHp data with amount spellcasting ability modifier and start-of-turn timing.

findings.issue: Hunter's Mark's extra Force damage is represented, but Advantage on Wisdom (Perception or Survival) checks to find the marked target is only generic utility prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-check modifier fields for skill-specific Advantage against a marked target.
