findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime abilityCheckModifier data for Wisdom (Perception) and Wisdom (Survival) checks made to find the target.

findings.issue: The servant can be commanded to move up to 15 feet, but movement is only in objectDescription prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled entity movement fields for commanded movement distance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime controlledMovement data with maxDistance 15 feet per command.

findings.issue: The servant can interact with objects and perform simple tasks including fetching, cleaning, mending, folding, lighting fires, serving food, and pouring drinks, but allowed task categories are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add controlled task fields for simple humanlike tasks and object interaction.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime taskCapabilities data for object interaction and listed task categories.

findings.issue: The spell changes carried equipment size and has immediate reversion rules for dropped/thrown items, but those object-state transitions are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add equipment size propagation and item reversion fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime itemSizePropagation data for worn/carried items and reversion triggers on drop or thrown hit/miss.

findings.issue: Rope Trick creates an extradimensional space with explicit portal size, access, capacity, and occupant size limits, but no structured/runtime field preserves those parts.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created/extradimensional structure fields for portal aperture, capacity count, allowed occupant size, and access method.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime extradimensionalSpace or createdStructure data for 3-by-5-foot portal, eight Medium-or-smaller occupants, and climb-rope access.

findings.issue: The +1 AC bonus is represented, but the +1 saving throw bonus while within 60 feet is not first-class in runtime JSON.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add saving throw bonus fields parallel to AC bonus fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime save bonus data for +1 to all saving throws while linked and in range.

findings.issue: The spell grants Advantage on Wisdom saving throws and Death Saving Throws, but runtime stores this in prose only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add saving throw advantage fields scoped by save category.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveAdvantage data for Wisdom saves and Death Saving Throws.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Terrain/surface rules need stronger terrain, surface, passability, and environmental-state fields when not already covered by TERRAIN.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add terrain/surface bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current terrain/utility representation as interim data.

findings.issue: Haste's +2 AC is represented, but its speed, save advantage, and limited extra action remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement multiplier, saving throw advantage, and limited extra-action fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movementModifier, saveModifier, and extraAction data.

findings.issue: Mass Healing Word's spellcasting ability modifier addend is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add healing ability modifier addend fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime healing.addAbilityModifier=spellcasting.

findings.issue: The stone surface/object requirement is only partially represented and lacks the body-capacity constraint.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add surface/object material and capacity fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceFilter material=stone and mustContainCasterBody.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object stats, structure durability, or object transformations need explicit AC/HP/passability/damageability fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object stat/damageability bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current spatial/utility fields until propagation.

findings.issue: Motivational Speech grants Wisdom save advantage and a conditional next attack-roll advantage after being hit, but both are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save advantage and hit-triggered next attack advantage fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveModifier Wisdom advantage and hit-triggered nextAttackAdvantage.

findings.issue: Motivational Speech grants and scales temporary hit points, but runtime has no typed temporary HP effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add temporary hit point amount and scaling fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime TEMPORARY_HIT_POINTS effect value 5 with +5 per slot above 3.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object stats, structure durability, or object transformations need explicit AC/HP/passability/damageability fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object stat/damageability bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current spatial/utility fields until propagation.

findings.issue: Slow has multiple debuffs that are not typed: speed halving, AC penalty, Dexterity save penalty, and one-attack limit.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add movement multiplier, AC penalty, save penalty, and action/attack limit fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime slowDebuff data for speed x0.5, AC -2, Dexterity saves -2, one attack only.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Object stats, structure durability, or object transformations need explicit AC/HP/passability/damageability fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add object stat/damageability bucket fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Use current spatial/utility fields until propagation.

findings.issue: The straight and ringed wall forms are typed, but cold-created frozen wall sections with AC, HP, destruction, and non-refill gaps are not first-class structure states.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add destructible section fields for created or transformed wall portions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime destructibleSections data for frozen 5-foot-square sections.

findings.issue: Grappled is typed with the correct spell-save escape DC, but the Huge-or-smaller eligibility, one-creature grapple limit, free release, and higher-level grapple capacity are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add grapple rider fields for size limit, capacity, free release, and capacity scaling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime grapple rider data.

findings.issue: The hound is intangible and invulnerable, but runtime lacks typed durability and physicality semantics.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-entity physicality and invulnerability fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdEntity.physicality and invulnerable data.

findings.issue: The target must be Large or smaller, and runtime lacks this size filter.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add target size eligibility fields for creature/object targets.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target size filter for Large or smaller.

findings.issue: The hand has AC 20, HP equal to the caster's hit point maximum, Strength 26, Dexterity 10, does not fill its space, and the spell ends at 0 HP; runtime lacks typed object stats and damageability.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-object stat and durability fields with formulas.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime handStats and handDurability data.

findings.issue: Whenever the spell deals damage, the caster regains hit points equal to half the Necrotic damage taken; runtime lacks linked life-drain healing fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damage-linked healing fields for half damage dealt.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime lifeDrainHealing data.

findings.issue: The restraining rock's AC 15, 25 HP, and poison/psychic immunity are not represented.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add restraint-object stats fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime transmuteRockObjectStats data.

findings.issue: Each pillar's AC 5, 30 hit points, crumble-to-rubble behavior, and clearing time are not represented as object stats and aftermath data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-object stats, destruction, and rubble cleanup fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime pillarObjectStats data.

findings.issue: Frozen water and a stored globe are represented, but runtime lacks first-class created object/storage lifecycle fields for the globe and ice object stats.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created object lifecycle and ice object/stat fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime storedProjectile and createdIceObject data.

groups.title: End Cleanup: Space Or Passage Ejection
groups.closureRule: Spell-created spaces, passages, or containers end and move their contents to an exit, anchor, nearest space, or other explicit destination.

findings.issue: Blink lets the caster choose the return space within 10 feet, with fallback to the nearest unoccupied space; runtime stores this in prose only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add return-placement choice fields for visible unoccupied space within range and fallback nearest space.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarReturn data for chosen return location and fallback placement.

findings.issue: The return requires a visible unoccupied space within 10 feet or nearest unoccupied fallback; no structured/runtime placement filter exists.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add unoccupied visible destination eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime destinationFilter data.

findings.issue: Blink uses an end-of-turn 1d6 roll, shifts the caster to the Ethereal Plane on 4-6, ends instantly if already there, and returns the caster at start of next turn; runtime only has corrected prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring planar shift fields for die roll, success range, destination plane, already-on-plane ending, return timing, and return placement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarShift data instead of prose-only utility text.

findings.issue: The spell requires a stone object or surface large enough to contain the caster and later expels to the nearest unoccupied entry-adjacent space.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add stone object/surface capacity targeting and expulsion destination fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime target filter for stone object/surface large enough for caster and expelToNearestUnoccupiedEntrySpace.

findings.issue: If an extraplanar target does not return, it is transported to a random location on a plane chosen by the DM and associated with its creature type; this destination choice is prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar destination choice fields for random location, DM-chosen plane, and creature-type association.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarDestination data.

findings.issue: Targets are transported to a harmless demiplane, may reappear at the original or nearest unoccupied space, and certain creature types can be sent permanently to an associated plane; runtime only stores Banished/Incapacitated statuses.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar transport fields for temporary demiplane, return placement, permanent non-return, creature-type filter, and associated-plane destination.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarMovement data.

findings.issue: Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, and Fiend targets do not return if the spell lasts for 1 minute; runtime has no typed duration-completion branch by creature type.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional ending fields for no-return-on-full-duration with creature-type filters.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalEnding data for full-duration extraplanar banishment.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the target reappears in its original space or nearest unoccupied space, unless the creature-type full-duration branch prevents return; runtime lacks return placement.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add post-spell return placement fields for original space and nearest unoccupied fallback.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime returnPlacement data.

findings.issue: A creature that succeeds on the initial save chooses the nearest unoccupied exit space, a Large or smaller creature can choose to fail, and overflow ejection randomly chooses an already restrained creature; runtime lacks these choice/random-selection branches.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-result placement choice, voluntary failure, and random overflow ejection fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ejectionChoice and overflowSelection data.

findings.issue: The initial and repeat Strength saves are typed, but Huge-or-larger automatic success, Large-or-smaller voluntary failure, and ram-forced saves are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add size-based save overrides, voluntary save failure, and ram-triggered save fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveOverrides and ramSaveTrigger data.

findings.issue: The sphere can restrain up to four Medium-or-smaller creatures or one Large creature, while Huge-or-larger creatures automatically succeed; runtime lacks capacity and size-filter fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add area capacity fields by target size and auto-success size filters.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sphereCapacity and sizeEligibility data.

findings.issue: As an action, the caster can move the sphere up to 30 feet in a straight line and ram it into creatures to force saves; runtime lacks granted movement/ram action data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add sustained created-area movement fields for action cost, distance, straight-line restriction, carried restrained targets, and ram trigger.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime createdAreaMovement and ramAction data.

findings.issue: The sphere hovers no more than 10 feet above the ground, safely descends over drop-offs, moves restrained creatures with it, and falls when the spell ends; runtime lacks created-sphere movement and vertical constraint fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-area movement/hover fields for height cap, drop-off descent, carried occupants, and spell-end fall.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime sphereMovement data.

findings.issue: The spell-end sequence makes the sphere fall, extinguishes normal flames within 30 feet, knocks restrained creatures prone where it falls, and then makes the water vanish; runtime lacks typed spell-end cleanup sequence fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ordered spell-end cleanup fields for created areas with occupant and environmental effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime cleanupOnEnd sequence data.

findings.issue: The hit-triggered Force damage, Charisma save, Banished status, and Incapacitated status are now represented, but the banishment save only occurs if the attack reduces the target to 50 Hit Points or fewer; runtime lacks a typed HP-threshold gate for the save/status branch.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add hit-result HP-threshold gating fields for riders.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime riderCondition hpAtOrBelow 50 for the banishment branch.

findings.issue: The target can be transported to a harmless demiplane and later return to its original or nearest unoccupied space; runtime has Banished/Incapacitated but no typed demiplane transport or return placement data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar/demiplane transport and return placement fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime banishmentTransport and returnPlacement data.

findings.issue: When the spell ends, the target reappears in its original space or nearest unoccupied fallback; runtime lacks typed spell-end return placement.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add spell-end return placement fields for banishment effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime returnPlacement data.

findings.issue: The spell-end return leaves the target in its original or nearest unoccupied space, but runtime lacks typed post-effect placement state.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aftermath placement fields for post-banishment return.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime spellEndAftermath return placement data.

findings.issue: The caster chooses opening dimensions up to 5 feet wide, 8 feet tall, and 20 feet deep; runtime has only a coarse cube size.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add opening dimension fields for width, height, and depth maxima.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime passageDimensions data.

findings.issue: The target point must be on a wooden, plaster, or stone surface, and later ejection goes to the nearest unoccupied space; runtime lacks material/surface and ejection-destination fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add surface material eligibility and ejection destination fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceEligibility and ejectionDestination data.

findings.issue: The wooden/plaster/stone wall, ceiling, or floor surface requirement remains prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add passage surface fields for allowed materials and orientations.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime passwallSurface data.

findings.issue: Runtime now marks the utility as creation, but the passwall opening's dimensions, no-instability rider, and safe ejection behavior are still prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add passage-creation fields for dimensions, structural stability, and ejection on disappearance.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime passwallOpening data.

findings.issue: The destination circle must be chosen from known same-plane sigil sequences; runtime lacks destination choice and known-sigil fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add teleportation-circle destination/sigil fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleportationCircleDestination data.

findings.issue: Arrival is within 5 feet of the destination circle or nearest unoccupied space if occupied; runtime lacks arrival-space fallback fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add arrival destination and fallback occupancy fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleportArrival data.

findings.issue: The portal travel, same-plane restriction, enter-portal trigger, and arrival placement remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add portal travel fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime teleportationPortal data.

findings.issue: Ejection to the nearest unoccupied space when the caster ends movement inside earth or stone is described in runtime, but there is no first-class nearest-unoccupied-space destination field.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add forced relocation destination fields for nearest unoccupied space and invalid end-position handling.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime invalidEndPositionRelocation data.

findings.issue: Earthquake ground radius, ignored earth/stone difficult terrain, and movement through solid earth/stone are represented in structured/runtime prose, but runtime lacks first-class ignore-terrain-cost and move-through-solid-material fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ignore-terrain-cost and move-through-solid-material fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime ignoreTerrainCost and phaseThroughMaterial data.

findings.issue: The ordinary 'Until the spell ends' duration is represented, but the special ending when the caster ends movement inside earth or stone is only described in prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending triggers tied to invalid end positions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalSpellEnd data for ending inside earth or stone.

findings.issue: Creatures appear in nearest unoccupied spaces near a prepared sanctuary; runtime represents teleport movement and options but lacks first-class sanctuary preparation and nearest-unoccupied placement fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add prepared sanctuary and nearest-unoccupied destination fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime preparedSanctuaryDestination data.

findings.issue: Teleport to a previously designated sanctuary is represented as MOVEMENT teleport, but runtime lacks first-class prepared-sanctuary state and no-effect-if-unprepared behavior.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add prepared destination and no-effect-if-missing-prerequisite fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime preparedSanctuaryTeleport data.

findings.issue: Ethereal-only interaction limits and higher-level willing-creature eligibility are preserved in utility/scaling prose, but runtime lacks first-class planar interaction filters and scaled target eligibility.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add planar interaction filter fields and scaled willing-target eligibility fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime planarInteractionFilter and scaledTargetEligibility data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Gate is a persistent two-sided planar portal with one-way front traversal and ruler vetoes; current movement fields can only approximate transport, not portal topology.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add a portal/travel topology bucket for two-ended portals, one-way sides, ruler/domain vetoes, and nearest-space placement.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Runtime JSON now records a MOVEMENT teleport effect and detailed Utility Options for portal topology.

groups.title: Save Counter Or Recurring End
groups.closureRule: Recurring saves, counted successes/failures, branch outcomes, or escape checks end or transform an ongoing effect.

findings.issue: The core mechanic is specifically Opportunity Attack suppression until the start of the target's next turn; the current status condition name is broader than the prose and carries inappropriate default escape/repeat-save data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add reaction/opportunity restriction fields for prohibited reaction subtype, hit condition, and until-start-of-target-next-turn duration, with not_applicable sentinels for escape and repeat saves.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime opportunityAttackSuppression data or narrow status condition metadata; clear inappropriate repeatSave/escapeCheck defaults once not-applicable sentinels exist.

findings.issue: Animal Friendship applies the Charmed condition to a Beast for 24 hours, but the status runtime includes inappropriate default repeat-save data that is not in the canonical prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add explicit not-applicable sentinels for repeat saves and escape checks on status effects that do not have them.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace default repeatSave/escapeCheck placeholders with schema-safe not_applicable values once the status template supports them.

findings.issue: Charm Person represents the Wisdom save and combat advantage modifier, but the status effect still carries inappropriate default repeat-save/escape placeholders not present in the prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add not_applicable sentinels for repeat saves and escape checks on one-save status effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Replace default repeatSave/escapeCheck placeholders with not_applicable values once supported.

findings.issue: Searing Smite's recurring Constitution save occurs after start-of-turn fire damage and ends the spell on success; the initial hit now applies the Ignited state without an incorrect initial save, but recurring damage/save sequencing still lacks first-class fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring damage plus post-damage save fields with success_ends semantics.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed one mismatch by removing the initial save gate and setting repeatSave to turn_start Constitution; add runtime recurring damage data and explicit damage-then-save sequencing.

findings.issue: Sleep now represents the initial Wisdom save, Incapacitated first stage, and a status-gated Unconscious second stage, but the exact branch timing remains approximated by generic repeat-save fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add staged save fields for initial save, repeat save at end of next turn, success/failure branches, and escalation.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Closed stale HP-pool and no-save modeling by adding Wisdom-save-gated Incapacitated plus a second Unconscious effect requiring Incapacitated; add richer stagedCondition data later for exact branch timing.

findings.issue: Restrained and the Strength (Athletics) escape action are represented, and the incorrect repeat save was removed; the remaining gap is the status duration while in webs or until escape.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add status duration fields for while_in_area_or_until_escape.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime status duration metadata tying Restrained to remaining in the webs or breaking free.

findings.issue: The initial Wisdom save is now represented, but the selected curse options include multiple d20 modifiers and a recurring Wisdom save that remain prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add option-scoped attack/save/check modifier fields and recurring save fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime curse option data for selected ability disadvantage, attacks against caster, and start-turn Wisdom save.

findings.issue: The caster gains Advantage on Strength saves near the pack, and creatures can be forced to make Dexterity saves from several once-per-turn pack proximity triggers; runtime lacks both the save advantage and the damage trigger model.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add aura-adjacent save advantage fields and pack proximity damage trigger fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveAdvantage and packDamageTrigger data.

findings.issue: The initial Intelligence save is now represented, but the repeat save whenever the target takes damage remains prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add damage-triggered repeat save fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime repeatSave trigger for on_damage_taken.

findings.issue: The initial Wisdom save and Charmed condition are represented, and inappropriate default repeat-save data was removed, but harm/conflict-triggered Wisdom save with advantage while fighting is not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional repeat save fields for harmful/conflicting tasks and fighting advantage.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime taskConflictRepeatSave data.

findings.issue: Frightened is represented and the fake escape check was removed, but dropping held items and forced Dash-away behavior are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add item-drop and forced behavior fields for drop held objects and Dash away by safest route.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime forcedDrop and forcedAction/movementBehavior data.

findings.issue: Blinded and Incapacitated are represented and fake escape/repeat saves were removed, but cataleptic false-death state and Speed 0 are not typed.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add state fields for cataleptic/apparent death and speed set to 0.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime stateChange data for apparent death and speedOverride 0.

findings.issue: Whirlpool pulls creatures in water within 25 feet 10 feet toward it, and swimming away requires an action plus Strength (Athletics) check; runtime has no typed pull or escape check for this mode.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add environmental forced movement fields for pull distance, radius, medium requirement, and escape action/check.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Whirlpool forcedMovement and escapeCheck data.

findings.issue: The target must fail a Constitution save before the duration effects apply; runtime still stores this as utility prose rather than a typed save-gated ongoing effect.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add save-gated ongoing debuff fields for effects that are not standard conditions.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime save-gated Elemental Bane effect data.

findings.issue: The spirit forces Dexterity saves when a visible creature enters its space or starts its turn within 5 feet, only if the spirit has no creature Restrained; runtime lacks these trigger filters and occupancy restriction.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add created-hazard save trigger fields for enter-space, start-turn-nearby, visible target, and no-current-restrained-target gating.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime elementalSpiritTrigger data.

findings.issue: Failed saves apply Restrained until the spell ends, with start-turn repeat saves and one-creature capacity; runtime lacks the Restrained status and linked repeat-save damage branch.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked status/rider fields for restrained-by-created-spirit, capacity, repeat saves, and failed-repeat damage.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Restrained effect linked to elementalSpiritTrigger.

findings.issue: The initial Constitution save, damage, and Poisoned condition are typed, but runtime lacks the chosen-ability save disadvantage, three-success/three-failure progression, and save-to-resist condition removal.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add linked save-disadvantage rider fields, counted repeat-save tracks, and condition-removal resistance checks.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime contagionProgression data.

findings.issue: The Wisdom save, Advantage when the caster or allies are fighting the target, and on-damage repeat save are still prose-only in runtime.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add domination save fields for initial save, combat-state advantage, and on-damage repeat save.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dominationSave data.

findings.issue: The target gains Charmed for the duration, with repeat save on damage and domination riders; runtime lacks typed Charmed effect and status riders.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add Charmed status plus domination rider fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime Charmed STATUS_CONDITION and domination riders.

findings.issue: Runtime represents successful repeat save ending, but it still lacks typed data for the flames being impossible to extinguish by nonmagical means.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add extinguishability or ending-prevention fields for magical ongoing effects.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime endingRestrictions data for nonmagical extinguishing immunity.

findings.issue: Initial damage and repeat save are represented, but the d6 penalty to attack rolls, ability checks, and Constitution concentration saves remains only implicit in the Muddled Thoughts status.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add multi-surface d6 penalty fields for attack rolls, ability checks, and concentration saves.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime muddledThoughtsPenalty data.

findings.issue: The initial Constitution save and Blinded save branch are represented, but the end-turn damage branch and action-launched ranged spell attack branch remain flattened into prose.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add separate recurring area-damage and wall-beam attack branches.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add on-end-turn wall damage and caster-action beam attack effects with shared scaling.

findings.issue: The initial Wisdom save, repeat save, attack-roll disadvantage, and Dexterity-save disadvantage are represented, but runtime lacks first-class saving-throw disadvantage and attacker-advantage-against-target fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add disadvantage-on-save and advantage-to-attackers fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime saveDisadvantage and attackerAdvantageAgainstTarget data.

findings.issue: The pain ends on a successful end-of-turn Constitution save, but runtime currently stores that in status aftermath/utility options rather than a typed recurring end condition.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring save end-condition fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime recurringSaveEndCondition data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Earthquake needs random fissure counts, variable fissure dimensions, structure height-derived collapse radius, and escape checks; current schema preserves these in options but not fully as data.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add random-count/random-dimension, structure-collapse radius, and escape-check fields for environmental hazards.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime environmentalHazards/fissures/structureCollapse objects with random formulas, derived radius, and escape DC/action data.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Feeblemind needs ability-score set-to-1 fields, spellcasting/magic-item/language/communication lockout fields, 30-day repeat saves, and explicit ending spells; current schema preserves these as utility/status text.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add ability-score override, capability lockout, long-interval repeat save, and ending-spell-list fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime debuff/capabilityLockout/repeatSaveInterval/endingSpells objects.

findings.issue: Actionable open: Tsunami needs a moving-wall hazard schema with per-round height decay, damage dice decay, once-per-round damage gate, size-filtered ongoing damage, swim escape check, and height-zero ending.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add moving-wall hazard, per-round decay, size filter, once-per-round gate, swim check, and height-ending fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime movingWallHazard object with current height/damage dice/position and decay rules.

groups.title: Illusion, Disguise, Or Reveal
groups.closureRule: Illusion/disguise behavior, reveal conditions, study actions, physical interaction, or apparent state needs runtime data.

findings.issue: Mold Earth can create shapes, colors, words, images, and patterns on dirt or stone for 1 hour.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add surface-marking fields for text/image/pattern/color changes and duration.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime surfaceMarking data.

findings.issue: Identify reveals item properties, usage, attunement requirement, charges, active spells, creator spell name, and creature-affecting spells, but runtime JSON stores this as one information description.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add identify-style knowledge payload fields for properties, usage, attunement, charges, active spells, creator spell, and creature active-spell list.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledgePayload data for each information category instead of one prose description.

findings.issue: Illusory Script controls which creatures know the true message and which see unintelligible or altered text, but those knowledge partitions are prose-only.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add viewer knowledge partition fields for designated creatures, other creatures, and Truesight readers.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime viewerKnowledge data for true, unintelligible, altered, and Truesight-readable states.

findings.issue: The spell reveals trap presence and general nature of the danger, but not exact location; this knowledge payload is not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add detection payload fields for presence_only, no_location, and general_danger_nature.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime knowledge payload data for trap presence and general danger nature without location.

findings.issue: The spell creates three duplicates in the caster's space that move with the caster and mimic actions, but duplicate count, following, mimicry, and indistinguishability are not structured.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion duplicate fields for count, location, follows caster, mimics actions, and indistinguishable behavior.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionDuplicates data.

findings.issue: The phantasm can represent dangerous terrain, creatures, objects, or hazards, but the represented hazard type and area are not first-class.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add phantasm representation fields for object/creature/phenomenon/hazard and max 10-foot Cube.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime phantasmRepresentation data.

findings.issue: The messenger can shape the dream environment with landscapes, objects, and images; runtime lacks typed dream illusion/environment-shaping fields.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add dream environment shaping fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime dreamEnvironment data.

findings.issue: Committing a new sigil sequence to memory after study is a knowledge-state change not represented in runtime.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add learned-sigil state fields.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime learnedSigil data.

findings.issue: The spell ends on successful initial save and after breach-trigger damage; runtime records the damage but lacks first-class conditional spell-ending triggers.
findings.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional spell-ending triggers for save success and breach events.
findings.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime conditionalSpellEnd data.
